title: Revenge Of Loyal Husband
description: Countries biggest businessman is cheated by his Wife, as he comes back to take revenge.

title: Jaadugar Romeo
description: A poor delivery boy named Romeo suddenly gains the extraordinary ability to see people’s lifespan and the true value of things, a power that changes his destiny overnight. When he saves Saloni, a wealthy heiress caught in a dangerous inheritance battle, he is pulled into a high-stakes world of money, power, and betrayal.

title: CM ki Dulhan
description: CM ki Dulhan is a political family drama set against the backdrop of dynastic Indian politics. The series explores how women, often treated as pawns in the game of power, can become players who change the very rules of the game. At its heart, the story is a love story born out of compulsion, evolving into a political partnership of equals. Through betrayal, corruption, and power struggles, Anandi and Arjun’s journey reflects themes of loyalty. Watch Now.

title: Chori Chori Chupke Chupke
description: A heartbroken software engineer returns home to propose to his girlfriend, only to discover she’s already engaged to a millionaire. Crushed by betrayal, his life takes a sudden turn when a mysterious, wealthy girl offers him a one-month contract marriage — to stop her ex-fiancé and expose the truth. Their fake marriage starts with revenge, but where will it end?

title: Meri Sanki Dulhaniya
description: A ruthless businesswoman, Sheetal, humiliates her employee Raj, unaware he’s a powerful tycoon in disguise. As ego clashes turn into a toxic marriage, Raj silently endures her cruelty while protecting her and her company from hidden threats. Amid revenge, power games, and emotional turmoil, hatred slowly transforms into love and redemption.

title: Badla
description: Publicly humiliated and thrown out as a useless employee, Prithvi hides a shocking truth—he is the real force behind the empire that rejected him. After years of silent sacrifice for love, betrayal turns him ruthless. As he reveals his true identity, he doesn’t fight back—he destroys everything. Now, the woman who insulted him must face the man who can erase her world.

title: Laapata Rajkumar
description: But when enemies close in and his past resurfaces, he must reclaim his power before losing everything, including the one person who stood by him.

title: The Silent Champion
description: Bharat is mocked as a useless ghar-jamai who has trained in martial arts for 10 years but can’t defeat anyone. When his powerful in-laws force him to win a brutal tournament or divorce his wife, his life falls apart. But a mysterious master discovers Bharat’s rare divine body, a hidden power that could turn the world’s biggest underdog into its most unstoppable warrior.

title: Instant Shehzada
description: After being cruelly dumped by his girlfriend for his "middle-class" status, Ayaan discovers he is the secret heir to the multi-billion dollar Arora Group of Industries. Now a powerful CEO, he systematically dismantles the corrupt rivals who once humiliated him while using his wealth to protect those he truly cares about. Along the way, he navigates dangerous traps set by gold diggers and vengeful socialites determined to steal his fortune.

title: Coolie Ki Diamond Dulhaniya
description: A chance meeting at a railway station brings together Aryan, a humble porter, and Aarohi, the daughter of a powerful diamond tycoon. When Aarohi chooses love over wealth and society, Aryan is humiliated, tested, and pushed to his limits. As secrets unravel, the world discovers that true worth is not defined by status or money but by courage, integrity, and love. This is a romantic drama where a “coolie” becomes a king, and love proves to be the rarest diamond of all.

title: Daddy on Contract
description: “A struggling actor pretends to be a successful superstar to protect his daughter’s pride, turning everyday life into a series of hilarious and emotional performances. But when truth and love collide, the biggest role of his life becomes being a real father.”

title: My Beggar Billionaire Husband
description: My Beggar Billionaire Husband

title: Pyaar ka Price
description: Piyush lives as a humble tailor while secretly being the billionaire owner of Tantra, sacrificing his wealth so his wife Vaani can succeed on her own. But Vaani humiliates him, cheats with her boss Raghav, and chases luxury and status. When tycoon Meher Mittal offers Vaani 300 crores for Piyush, she shockingly agrees and divorces him. Unaware that he is actually a billionaire, Vaani celebrates her deal until the truth emerges, leading to a downfall and a reckoning between greed and true love

title: Ajnabi ka Intezar Hai
description: A broken woman, robbed of motherhood, finds unexpected love in a humble construction worker—unaware he’s a secret billionaire hiding his true identity. As their fragile romance deepens, dark secrets, betrayal, and a stolen child resurface, forcing them to fight against fate, enemies, and shattered trust to claim the family they were destined for.

title: The Little Pool Master
description: When world-renowned pool champion Akhil Gulati dies in a tragic accident, his soul mysteriously enters the body of a shy schoolboy, Arjun Sehgal. With goons threatening the Sehgal family's legacy, Arjun stuns everyone by becoming a pool prodigy overnight—guided by Akhil’s unmatched skill. As Akhil helps win the decisive match, he suddenly wakes up in his original body, realizing it was all a coma-induced miracle. A silent smile shared between Akhil and Arjun hints at an unbreakable, mystical bond.

title: Dulhan Se Darling
description: Dulhan Se Darling is a fiery romantic drama of love, betrayal, and hidden identities. Kritika Reddy, heiress of a billion-dollar empire disguised as a cleaning staff, crosses paths with ruthless billionaire Rihaan Bhatt, sparking a storm of clashes, secrets, and undeniable attraction. But when her duplicitous fiancé and his mistress plot against her, Kritika must rise from humiliation to power—finding both revenge and unexpected love.

title: Jhukega Nahi Saala
description:
A powerful man living as a taxi driver fights crime while hiding his true identity and past pain.
When a woman from his past returns with his daughter, he must protect them and face his enemies and family secrets.

title: Billionaire's Bold Beginning
description: When a genius mechanic secretly known as the legendary racer “Cartik” saves a garage from a gangster through a deadly race, he later joins an electric car company where the arrogant new CEO humiliates and fires him. As rival companies battle to recruit him and a fake genius rises inside the company, Aarav prepares to prove that real talent cannot be replaced.

title: Lady Boss Returns
description:
My Boss Lady is a modern romantic drama set against the glittering world of luxury hotels, real estate empires, and high-stakes corporate alliances.
 It explores love, betrayal, and revenge through the journey of Kiara Bhansali, a self-made billionaire who hides her identity to test loyalty and integrity — and ends up meeting Tej Jaisingh, an ambitious CEO caught between love and legacy.
Their accidental meeting spirals into a whirlwind of mistaken identities, class clashes, fake marriages, and boardroom battles — until Kiara’s true power as the “Sky Queen” turns the game upside down.
 The series balances romantic comedy, emotional redemption, and corporate intrigue, delivering a story about a woman reclaiming love and respect on her own terms.

title: Immortal for 3000 Years
description: Immortal for 3000 is a supernatural action drama where ancient Indian mythology collides with the modern world. The story follows Rishi Vedant, a yogi who awakens after 3000 years of penance, only to find himself in the chaos of Kalyug. Gifted with divine powers, Vedant must confront dark forces, black magic, and betrayal while protecting humanity from rising evil. As he navigates modern society and forms unexpected bonds, his true test begins—facing both external demons and the shadows hidden in human greed and desire.

title: Mai Jhoota Tu Jhooti
description: Two childhood lovers reunite and rush into marriage, believing they’ve found love beyond money. But there’s a twist—both are secretly billionaires, pretending to be poor. As lies pile up, their relationship is tested by ego, humiliation, and hidden truths. When reality finally hits, will their love survive the biggest secret of all… or shatter forever?

title: Kesari…aam bana khaas
description: Micro Drama

title: Billionaire Bhikari
description: Aryan lives like a beggar—but hides a billionaire legacy. When Jhanvi insults him, she unknowingly steps into the world of a man who owns more than she can imagine. Billionaire Bhikari is a fiery tale of secrets, ego clashes, and a love story born where judgment ends. Watch Now!

title: Zero to Hero
description: Zero to Hero

title: The CEO’s Endgame
description: After years of silence, she’s ready to fight back. A story of resilience, courage, and finding your voice against all odds. Witness a powerful journey from darkness to unstoppable strength. Watch Now !

title: The Final Boss
description: Abhiraj Singh Rathore is the secret Raja of Rajputana Corporation and the richest man on Earth, but when he returns from the battlefield, his childhood sweetheart brutally dumps him, thinking he's a clown. How will the King of all men make her regret it?

title: Jamai No. 1
description: A seemingly jobless and meek Aarav endures daily humiliation from his in-laws, while his wife Priya struggles to shield him from their scorn. But when Aarav’s hidden identity as the powerful heir of the Mittal empire is revealed, their world turns upside down love, loyalty, and revenge collide in this tale of masks, marriage, and shocking revelations. Watch Now!

title: My Fake Billionaire Boyfriend
description: Cornered by a lie that she’s dating elusive billionaire Dev Raichand, Kashish must bring him to her best friend’s wedding or lose her friend and her job. She drags her runaway ex-fiancé Rahul back to play “Dev” for one night. The fake romance reignites old wounds, until the masquerade flips and the real Dev and their second chance stands revealed.

title: Billionaire Husband on Rent
description:
Tara Rampal — ek fierce army officer, jise apne baap ki jaidad sirf ek shart par mil sakti hai: shaadi! Majboori mein uski mulakaat hoti hai Jeet se — ek sadak chhapar bhikhari jaisa dikhne wala ladka, jo asal mein hai ek billionaire aur political kingmaker! Par Tara ko iss raaz ka pata nahi. Ek jhoothi shaadi, asli jazbaat, aur dushmano ka chakravyuh — iss kahani mein pyaar, politics, aur revenge sab kuch milega!
Jab sach samne aayega… kya rahega sirf pyaar ya sab kuch bikhar jaayega?

title: 100 Rupay Ka Boyfriend, CEO Nikla
description: A broke college girl hires a ‘100-rupee boyfriend’ for a fake relationship, only to discover he’s actually a secret multimillionaire CEO testing people’s intentions. As lies, love, and chaos collide, their small deal turns into a life-changing romance neither expected.

title: Mrs. Golddigger
description: After a rushed marriage to a stranger who demands ₹1 crore, a powerful CEO is convinced he’s been trapped by a gold digger—until his growing feelings and a haunting past force him to question if the woman he distrusts is actually the one who once saved his life.

title: Hanuman Code
description: Two brothers choose opposite destinies, one blessed with Hanuman’s divine power, the other reborn as an Asur. As darkness rises, a mythic battle between Dharma and Adharma begins… and only one will survive.

title: Eternal Love
description: Wealthy businessman Vikram escapes his daughter’s matchmaking by lying he’s married. Avni, also pretending for family pressure, crosses paths with him while seeking a fake marriage certificate. They agree to a no-strings union, unaware fate has other plans. After an accident, Avni reenters Vikram’s life as his office cleaner. Forced to pose as his wife, love grows amid secrets and chaos. When they move to divorce, they discover they had been truly married all along.

title: Love under arrest
description:
Romi and Shikha’s wedding turns tragic when her father accidentally injures Romi’s mother.
Blinded by anger, Romi turns his love into hatred and pushes Shikha away.
As Shikha battles illness and heartbreak, fate separates them further.
They reunite when she loses her memory, giving Romi a second chance.
Through love and redemption, he wins her back and they start anew.

title: Love Test Aur Dhokha
description: A billionaire tests his blind wife’s love, until losing her becomes his greatest fear.

title: Arranged to Love
description: A billionaire businessman, Vikram Singhania, has to enter into an arranged marriage with Dr. Bhoomi Arora because of family pressure. What starts as a cold, forced marriage slowly transforms into an unexpected journey of trust, passion, and love. Arranged to Love is a romantic drama where duty collides with desire, and two strangers must decide if their hearts can truly meet.

title: My Dangerous Love
description: Humiliated, discarded, and married off to a “bankrupt nobody,” a soft-spoken woman enters hell—only to discover her new husband is a feared mafia heir. As insults turn into bloodshed and love becomes lethal, her broken wedding becomes the fuse for a war no one survives untouched.

title: Love Lottery
description: Ayush, a humble street chaat wala vendor, unexpectedly inherits a ₹2000 crore sweets empire after a mysterious encounter. True love Pooja is forced to leave him due to family pressures, pulling Ayush into an emotional battle alongside his rise to power.  Ayush fights back with courage and intelligence In the end, he exposes the truth, defeats his enemies, and wins back both his rightful position and his love.

title: Crash Landed Into Love
description: After a plane crash, billionaire heir Amar Luthra survives with amnesia and is saved by kind-hearted surgeon Dr. Rumi. While greedy nurse Nisha fakes Amar’s death to seize the Luthra empire, Amar lives as a nobody beside the woman who saved him—until love, truth, and a ruthless conspiracy collide, forcing him to reclaim his identity before Rumi loses everything.

title: Blind Love Deadly Truth
description: After losing his eyesight in an accident, billionaire Karan Malhotra is abandoned by his girlfriend and pushed to the edge of despair. Aradhya, a strong-willed woman hiding her own powerful identity, saves him and agrees to a contract marriage to become his “eyes.” As Karan battles betrayal, a murderous stepbrother, and corporate conspiracies within Malhotra Jewels, the fake marriage slowly turns into real love while buried secrets about Aradhya, their past, and their child begin to surface.

title: Still Waiting for Love
description: Still Waiting for Love

title: The Rebith: Let My Wife Love Me Again
description: After a tragic end, a man is reborn with a second chance to win back the wife who once loved him. In this emotional story, fate hands him time, but not without new trials of the heart.

title: Unworthy Love
description: Separated from his wealthy family after a childhood accident and raised in poverty, Navneet lives as a humble junk dealer while secretly rising to become a mysterious billionaire CEO. While hiding his elite identity to test the character of those around him, he must protect his long-lost mother and daughter from the greed and humiliation of arrogant socialites.

title: Love Gamble
description: Love Gamble is a drama mini-series that follows the unlikely connection between a wealthy nightclub owner and a struggling young woman. The story begins when Litika, a homeless woman, rescues an expensive watch belonging to Nishant Singhaniya, a powerful club owner. Grateful and intrigued, Nishant brings Litika into his world, offering her a job and a place to stay.

title: Love Me Again
description:
एक निषिद्ध विवाह, छल और धमकियों की परछाइयों में आकार ले रहा है।
वचन बनने से पहले ही उन्हें तोड़ने के लिए गुंडे बुलाए जाते हैं।
एक माँ अपने नन्हे बच्चे की हिफ़ाज़त में जान की बाज़ी लगाती है, तभी अतीत की डरावनी परछाइयाँ लौट आती हैं।
प्यार, फ़रेब और जीने की जद्दोजहद में—किसी का भी अंजाम पक्का नहीं।

title: Cursed By Love
description: Vaishnavi, a devoted woman, faces heartbreak when her husband betrays and abandons her. But beneath her sorrow lies a shocking truth she is a wealthy heir and a genius ready to reclaim her power. As she rises from humiliation, fate brings her to Vikranth Desai, a commanding CEO who treats her with unmatched devotion. Unlike her cruel past, he showers her with love and respect, standing by her side as she exposes enemies and seeks justice.

title: CEO's Forbidden Love
description: A young girl battles betrayal, cruelty, and the dark secrets of her family while chasing her dreams of independence. Out of Mercy is a gripping tale of survival, resilience, and the fight for identity. Watch Now !

title: Golden Boy Ki Love Story
description: Yohan, a hidden billionaire, marries Suhana, who is forced to wed to save her inheritance. As love grows, he reveals his true identity and protects her from betrayal and danger. In the end, they overcome all odds and find happiness together.

title: Cricketer Ki Love Story
description: After a masked one-night encounter with India’s hottest cricket star, struggling physiotherapy student Shanaaya disappears, unknowingly leaving behind the ring her mother gave her. Humiliated and determined to find the mysterious girl who “priced” him, star cricketer Vicky Khurana launches a public hunt. When fate makes Shanaaya his personal physio, a dangerous game of secrets, class conflict, and rising attraction begins.

title: Love ki Adaalat
description: “Love Ki Adaalat” is a courtroom drama where justice battles power, manipulation, and emotions. When a poor fruit seller is blamed for an accident caused by a rich man, sharp lawyer Tanvi steps into a morally complex fight. As cases unfold, the courtroom becomes a stage for truth, love, and ethics, exposing how money and influence twist justice—and how courage can challenge it. Watch now.

title: Love Lies Aur Dhokha
description: Naina Malhotra, trapped in a loveless marriage with Shreyash, battles betrayal, abuse, and the poisonous schemes of Misty. Just when she stands on the edge of breaking, her childhood protector Dhruv returns bringing hope, strength, and a chance to reclaim her dignity. “Only You” is a tale of love, betrayal, and the courage to rise against cruelty.

title: Love After Custody
description: When warehouse worker Meera Sachdev crosses paths with billionaire heir Krish Malhotra, a night of fate binds them together forever. Torn between love and money, they must fight past secrets, family betrayals, and society’s judgment to protect their unborn child and discover what truly matters.

title: Sky High Love ✈️
description: For ten long years, Shivani's heart beat only for Mohit. A contract marriage and an unexpected child promised a fairytale life — until destiny struck. When Mohit's past returned to claim him, Shivani's world crumbled. Shattered and betrayed, she walked away… only for Mohit to realise, too late, that he had lost the love of a lifetime.

title: Twisted Love
description:
After a traumatic encounter where Yash forcibly impregnates Roshni, her life takes a darker turn when her own stepmother sells her to a wealthy aristocrat. The cruel irony? This powerful man is none other than Yash's estranged brother, Vikram.
While Vikram acquires Roshni merely as a plaything to torment, Yash undergoes an unexpected transformation - he genuinely falls in love with his victim. Torn between guilt and devotion, Yash devises a desperate plan: he finds and trains a Roshni lookalike to take her place.

title: Dad, Love Me Again
description: A palace maid with a mysterious past rises through the imperial court, navigating love, betrayal, and political intrigue. As secrets unfold, she must choose between loyalty to the empire and her own survival.

title: Sweet Love: The CEO Dad Who Can't Escape
description: A heartwarming romantic comedy about a cold, powerful CEO whose life turns upside down when he discovers he has an adorable child—and the child’s mother is the woman he once let go. Between boardroom battles and bedtime stories, he learns that love is the one thing he can’t escape.

title: Ultimate Game of Love
description: In a world of greed, betrayal, and hidden identities, Natasha Nanda battles her stepsister Trisha and her manipulative father while secretly yearning for love from her bodyguard, Jai. Trapped in a web of lies, jealousy, and power struggles, Natasha is torn between sacrifice and survival. As truths unravel, dangerous rivalries push the family toward shocking consequences where love, revenge, and redemption collide. Watch now.

title: Love to Hate You
description: Yash and Nandini’s love ended when she, hiding her cancer, faked an affair with Rahul. Heartbroken, Yash took over his father’s company. A year later, they crossed paths again, but his fiancée and Rahul conspired against Nandini. Yash uncovered the truth, rescued her, and she survived after surgery

title: Love Ka Ultimate Test
description: A passionate love story between Suman, a wealthy industrialist's daughter, and Nivaan, a humble mechanic, who must endure six months of humiliation as a servant in her family's mansion to prove his worthiness. Through determination, talent, and unwavering love, Nivaan transforms from a garage worker to a successful entrepreneur, ultimately winning both Suman's hand and her family's respect.

title: Love Me if You Dare
description: Navami, a girl working at a bar, faces the risk of losing her job because of Abhinav. Struggling without money, her life takes unexpected turns. What is the connection between Navami and Abhinav? Find out in "Love Me if You Dare", only on your Kuku TV.

title: Last Date Of Love
description: After enduring a decade of a thankless, contractual marriage to save his grandmother, a devoted man grants his ungrateful wife a divorce when her manipulative ex-lover returns—only to find his hidden worth recognized too late when he becomes a global success and must return to save his estranged family from a dangerous extortion plot.

title: College Wala Love
description: When elite intelligence officer Major Rudra Pratap Singh uncovers a covert threat to national security, he must lead Operation Queen Fall—a high-risk mission to dismantle an international espionage ring led by the enigmatic and deadly Aaliya Raza. As betrayals surface and loyalties are tested, Rudra races against time to stop a catastrophe that could rewrite global power dynamics.

title: My Toxic Love
description:
Too much of anything is hard. Even love.
What kind of trouble did Divya’s love drag Arjun into?
To know the struggles Arjun went through, watch “My Toxic Love” only on Kuku TV

title: Love Ignition
description: She married for duty. He stayed for guilt. But when the truth erupts, who will survive the fire? Love Ignition is a gripping tale of heartbreak, betrayal, and second chances. Watch Now !

title: Forced to Love
description: When fate traps two opposites in an unexpected bond, love is the last thing on their minds. Forced to Love is a dramatic tale of passion, pain, and a destiny neither can escape. Watch Now !

title: Love In Paris
description: After a whirlwind encounter in Paris and a chance reunion years later, a resilient woman named Kavya enters into a high-stakes contract marriage with Vedant, unaware that her "hired" husband is actually a billionaire CEO.

title: A Deal Signed in Love
description: Diya is not an ordinary girl. But her sister, wanting to keep her normal, ruined her marriage. For the sake of property, Diya made a big decision. What was it? Find out in "A Deal Signed in Love", only on your Kuku TV.

title: Love Ka Second Dose
description:
Ishita and Aarav were once lovers who were murdered by an anonymous killer on a fateful night. Ishita is given a second chance at love by Yamraj, but this time as a poor girl, and her love Aarav having no memory of her, and moreover, married to someone else.
One thing leads to another, and Ishita bumps into Aarav, eventually getting closer to her. Things take a dramatic turn when Ishita has strong suspicion of Aarav’s wife being the killer earlier.

title: Reborn- The Doctor's Second Chance at Love
description: A touching romantic drama about a brilliant doctor who dies with regrets but is reborn with the chance to rewrite destiny. This time, while saving lives, he also heals his own heart and discovers a love he once lost.

title: Marshal Fu's favor Love
description: Marshal Fu's favor Love

title: The Love Trap
description: A girl forced to become her sister’s shadow enters a world of betrayal, ambition, and stolen love. But revenge burns quietly. Will she take back everything… or lose herself in the process? Watch Now !

title: Silver Love
description:
On one side stands the city’s most powerful tycoon, Harshvardhan Mehra. On the other, a simple woman, Nandita, scarred by life’s betrayals.
But when destiny brings them together, love is tested by lies, pride, and pain. When a marriage becomes a wish… and a lie becomes the foundation of a bond… who decides the fate of the heart, love, or a life trapped in deception? Watch Now!

title: Where Love Fades Away
description: A woman’s perfect marriage crumbles when betrayal and lies slowly unravel the truth behind her husband’s double life. In the ashes of heartbreak, she fights to reclaim her dignity and rebuild her future.

title: Love of Life Time
description: Watch "Love of Life Time" Only On Kuku TV!

title: Price of Love
description: A raw, emotional journey of two souls torn apart by secrets, betrayal, and ambition, only to collide years later with scars, unspoken truths, and a love tested by hidden sacrifices, a fragile child, and financial ruin. As passion reignites, destiny dares to heal what pride and pain once destroyed—but will love survive the cost?”

title: THE LOVE AFFAIR
description: Love Affair is a story about two lovebirds who fight the world in the name of love.

title: Her Beauty, His Love
description:
Riya joins her dream college but faces humiliation from Aksha and Krish.
From clashes in a project, love slowly blossoms, though Aksha’s jealousy creates hurdles.
Riya transforms and gains confidence, while Krish realizes his true feelings.
In the end, the two unite in love.

title: Thieves In Love
description: In a world where passion, rivalry, and hidden identities collide, Naina, a kind-hearted yet fiery dancer, finds herself constantly at odds with the arrogant Aryan. Their clashes turn into sparks on and off the stage, even as her best friend Reema flirts her way toward Rohit. But when a mysterious masked benefactor named Raj begins secretly helping those in need, Naina’s heart is torn between admiration and suspicion. Watch Now!

title: Law of Love
description: A determined young woman battles betrayal, love, and family chaos while seeking justice for her imprisoned father. As her world collides with her legal aid’s ambition and deceit, buried secrets begin to surface. In a web of lies and emotions, every choice draws her closer to redemption—or ruin.

title: A Beam Of LIght In The Darkness : Mother's Love
description: A deeply moving family drama that celebrates the strength of a mother’s love. When life throws unbearable challenges at her children, she becomes their guiding light, proving that even in the darkest times, a mother’s love can heal, protect, and transform destinies.

title: Waiting for Love ❤️
description: Aditya Singhania, ek ameer aur tanha businessman hai, aur Roohi Bhatia, ek self-made food stall wali, jo apne toote rishton, zalim bahu aur purani beizzatiyon se joojh rahi hai. Dono ki mulaqat hoti hai Aditya ki beti Taanvi ke zariye, jahan ek choti si matchmaking ek gehri kahani ban jaati hai. Aditya apni asli pehchaan chhupata hai, dekhna chahta hai kya Roohi use chahti hai ya uski daulat ko. Lekin Roohi ke liye ye rishte sirf pyaar tak seemit nahi rehte — iss safar mein use mil jaati hai apni wo beti, jo 5 saal pehle kho gayi thi.

title: Bheekh Maange Billionaire
description: “Ultimate Love” is a passionate drama

title: Love on Delivery
description: Love on Delivery

title: Pyaar on Road
description: A street-smart Jaipur Uber driver Prakriti and gentle empire heir Akshay Middha can’t stand each other, until a forced contract marriage slowly turns dislike into love, and boardroom conspiracies, jealous Suhani, and drug-running cousin Tanmay turn their fake vows into a deadly war for power and the heart. Watch now!

title: Tere Pyar Mein
description: A passionate artist, Needhi, and billionaire Nishchay — once lovers separated by deceit — reunite years later when fate brings them face to face through art. Hidden truths, betrayal, and redemption unfold as they discover their lost daughter and confront their manipulative past. The story ends with forgiveness, justice, and the family finally finding peace and love again. Watch now.

title: Love beyond Money
description: Younger Groom, Endless Love

title: Meri Aashiqui Ab Tum Hi Ho
description: Meri Aashiqui Ab Tum Hi Ho is a heartbreaking romantic drama of eternal love, sacrifice, and fate. Meera’s world shatters when she discovers Arjun’s betrayal, unaware he is hiding a fatal illness and pushing her away to protect her dreams. As secrets, scandals, and destiny collide, their love is tested to its final breath—where passion meets tragedy in the most unforgettable way.

title: A Billionaire Love Triangle
description:
Anjali, a determined woman from humble beginnings, re-enters the life of her estranged husband Karan Saxena just as he is about to get engaged to Ria Mittal, the only daughter of a wealthy business family. Her unexpected arrival disrupts the celebrations and exposes the secret past the Mittals were never prepared to face.As Anjali stands her ground against humiliation and class prejudice, the once-clear lines between truth and lies begin to blur. Karan is torn between the comfort of a powerful alliance with Ria and the haunting reality of his unresolved past with Anjali. Meanwhile, Ria finds herself caught between love, pride, and betrayal.

The story weaves through layers of deception, emotional manipulation, and power struggles, ultimately portraying a woman’s journey to reclaim her voice, dignity, and justice in a world that sought to silence her.

title: Contract Love
description:
Mohini and Karan Walia are two ambitious individuals who both want control of their family businesses. But there’s one condition standing in their way, their parents have made it clear that they’ll only hand over the business if they get married. To solve the problem, Mohini and Karan decide to fake a marriage.
Mohini thinks Karan is just a sweet, struggling waiter. What she doesn’t know is that he’s actually a billionaire. Karan hides his real identity because he knows Mohini hates rich, arrogant men, and he doesn’t want to ruin the connection they’re building. As they live together pretending to be husband and wife, things start getting complicated. Karan’s friend and Mohini’s stepsister both try to break them apart. But despite everything, Mohini and Karan begin to grow closer, and eventually, they fall in love for real. In the end, what started as a lie turns into something true, and their fake marriage becomes the beginning of a real one.

title: Fukra Billionaire
description: A florist, Radhika, falls for single father Vedant, unaware of his hidden wealth and past. Their love faces betrayal, class divides, and manipulation from his ex-wife Neha. A tale of deceit, redemption, and enduring love. Watch now.

title: Temporary Shaadi, Permanent Pyaar
description: A drunken Holi wedding ties Varun and Mita in an accidental marriage they both want to escape. Fate repeatedly throws them together as enemies turn allies and attraction grows into love. When truth finally surfaces, a wrong vow transforms into the right love. Watch now.

title: Ishq, Dhoka aur Revenge
description: Arav Malhotra endured every insult for the woman he loved but Nisha betrayed him for her greed! What she didn't know is that Arav is no ordinary salesman. And his revenge will teach her a lesson she can never forget!

title: Contract Wala Pyaar
description: Alia, desperate to save her mother, is forced into a 6-month contract marriage with the mysterious Karan Malhotra. What begins as a deal soon turns into a tangled journey of care, betrayal, hidden identities, and unexpected love. Will their bond survive the lies and conspiracies—or will this marriage remain just a contract? Watch Now!

title: Pyar ka Turbulence
description: A pregnant woman fights for her life on a turbulent flight—only to discover her pilot husband abandoning her for another woman. After losing her baby and being framed as a murderer, she rises from betrayal and heartbreak to reclaim her power… returning as a mysterious aviation titan determined to expose the lies that destroyed her life.

title: Pyaar Ka Qatal
description: “Pyaar Ka Qatal” is a poignant tale of love, betrayal, and redemption. Ajay, a devoted but struggling man, gives everything for his wife Mouni and daughter, only to be humiliated and betrayed when Mouni chooses wealth and status over him. Heartbroken yet resilient, Ajay rebuilds himself into a successful entrepreneur. When he returns, the story unfolds a powerful journey of regret, truth, and the real meaning of love. Watch now!

title: Pyaar Ya Pagalpan
description: is an intense romantic psychological thriller. The story follows Param, a struggling yet sincere artist, and Amrita, a powerful but deeply unstable CEO. What begins as admiration for his art slowly turns into obsession, control, and manipulation. As love blurs into madness, Param is trapped in a dangerous game of identity, sacrifice, and survival, where escaping the past becomes the only way to reclaim his freedom and start over.

title: Dhokhe Se mohabbat
description: “A blind girl and a scarred gangster find unexpected love in each other’s darkness, but their past sins and enemies threaten to tear them apart. Between betrayal, revenge, and redemption, their love becomes both their curse and salvation.”

title: Love at 50 - Tu Hi Hai Ibadat
description: A wealthy businessman, Vikram Singh Rathod, is caught off guard when his daughter invites a group of women to his office, hoping he’ll choose a life partner. To escape, he falsely claims to be married. Meanwhile, Avni Verma, pressured by her daughter-in-law to marry into wealth, also lies about her marital status. Seeking a fake marriage certificate, they meet and agree to a no-strings-attached union, with Avni concealing her identity. But fate intervenes—Vikram accidentally injures Avni, who reenters his life a year later as a cleaner in his office. As Vikram’s daughter insists on meeting her “stepmother,” Avni steps in to play the part, still unaware they are legally married. Amid mistaken identities and emotional chaos, they develop genuine feelings for each other. Eventually, as they attempt to formally divorce and end the charade, they realize they had been truly married all along.

title: Pyaar, Pistol aur Power
description: When a suspended female cop goes undercover as a thief inside Mumbai’s most feared mafia don’s empire, a deadly game of power, loyalty, and forbidden love begins, where one wrong move can cost her life, and one truth can destroy an entire criminal kingdom.

title: Mera Gumshuda Lover
description: Childhood promises bind Tara and Aditya, two lost souls torn apart by fate. Sixteen years later, Tara now a powerful CEO searches endlessly for the boy who once protected her, while Aditya, burdened by betrayal and amnesia, fights to reclaim his identity. Between Jatin’s cunning schemes, Jiya’s manipulative love, and a highstakes corporate game of power and deception, their story unfolds a battle of love, lies, and strategy. Watch Now!

title: Kya Love 💗 Hoga Dobara?
description: Kya Love Hoga Dobara

title: Jaanleva Ishq
description: A rich but undercover heir, Vikram, hides as a waiter to find his enemies, while his life gets tangled with Komal, a small-town girl chasing her dream of becoming a ballet dancer, and her jealous step-sister who stands in her way.

title: Salt N Pepper Love
description: Salt N Pepper Love

title: Unexpected Love
description: Unexpected Love

title: Sinful Love
description: A rebel gang leader. A priest’s daughter. A forbidden love that burns brighter than any rule. Sinful Love is a ride through secrets, betrayals, passion, and the price of choosing your heart over everything else. Watch now.

title: Fake Promise True Love
description: He promised her a future, then vanished like a lie. What starts as heartbreak turns into a gripping quest for justice and love. False Promise, True Love is a raw, emotional ride through betrayal, courage, and redemption. Watch Now !

title: Pyar Bhari Dushmani
description: Radhika, ek girti hui zindagi se ladti hai aur apna ghar wapas paane ke liye ek khatarnaak deal karti hai. Uski takraar Samrat, ek arrogant billionaire se hoti hai, jahan nafrat aur pyaar ke beech ek dangerous khel shuru ho jaata hai

title: Clumsy Love
description: Clumsy Love

title: Pyar ya Vyapar
description:
Tina, a rising model, is shattered when her boyfriend betrays her with her best friend and her agency humiliates her. But fate brings her to Rajdeep Rai, a powerful CEO. What begins as a fake boyfriend act soon spirals into a whirlwind of passion, betrayal, and redemption. Together, they battle conspiracies, family feuds, and painful pasts in search of a love worth everything.
Will their story end in heartbreak… or forever? Watch Now!

title: Love Mera Fast & Furious.
description:
Neha is torn between caring for her ailing mother and surviving her abusive stepfather.
 To make ends meet, she secretly works as Maya, a dancer at illegal street races.
 There, she meets Lucky - a masked, underground racer who sweeps her into a night of passion…
unaware that he’s going to stay at her home soon.

title: Love Kites
description: Prerna, a kind-hearted doctor, once fell in love with Jay, a charming pilot. Years later, their paths cross again but things are not the same. Jay is cold, distant, and secretly engaged to someone else. When Prerna finds out she’s pregnant with his child, Jay agrees to marry her but only as a contract.Now, Prerna must raise her child, protect her dignity, and face Jay every day while he lives a double life with his ex, Mihika, who pretends to be the perfect partner. Unaware that the woman he treats like a stranger… is the same girl who once gave him a piece of her heart and he lost her to time and memory.

title: Fight For Love
description: Anika Thakur is a college student who has to pay off huge debt to Maddy. In order to cancel the debt, Maddy asks her to work as secretary to a his rival Rich man Vikram and spy on Vikram's activities. Vikram has an incriminating secret, he fights in a illegal MMA club at night and works as suave CEO in the day. While spying for Maddy, Anika develops feelings for Vikram and it creates a conflict in her mind. As Vikram too falls for Anika, how both of them will fight for their love for each other

title: Badla: Khoon aur Mohabbat
description: Kriti Malhotra, shrouded in secrets and vengeance, weaves her way into the lives of Aditya and his powerful father Vikram. As lies and half-truths entangle them, Aditya struggles to uncover her true identity, Himani, a woman thought to be lost forever. In a world driven by betrayal, greed, and revenge, every move Kriti makes threatens to shatter the Ahuja family, while Vikram, Nitin, and Anita fight to protect their own dark legacies. Watch Now!

title: Pyaar ki Terms and Conditions
description: When an arrogant business tycoon Tanishq Chaudhary and fiery hotel butler Vamika Sharma are forced into a shocking contract marriage, love and ego collide. What starts as a deal soon turns into a dangerous game of hearts, where every emotion comes with conditions.

title: Risky love
description: Nurse Ananya Sharma’s life takes a shocking turn when a deal to save her brother’s life binds her to ruthless mafia kingpin Robin Shetty in a one-year contract marriage. As betrayals, rival gangs, and deadly secrets close in, Ananya must navigate love, fear, and the dangerous world of a man who will kill to protect her. Watch Now!

title: Pyaar vs Parivaar
description: When an 18-year-old village girl, Meena returns from a Mumbai college trip six months pregnant - with twins fathered by a powerful man, Veer from a “lower caste” - she is brutalized by her family and marked for an honor killing, until the father rescues her and publicly claims her as his wife, forcing a traditional society to confront its own violence, prejudice, and hypocrisy. Watch now!

title: Love By Chance
description: Arohi is about to get married to the love of her life Vinay, but little does she know that he is cheating on her with her best friend and has no intention to marry Arohi. She finds out about Vinay's infidelity on the day of her wedding.  Vihaan Malhotra who is compelled by his family to marry someone or else will be disinherited is present at the court house waiting for someone to get into contract marriage. Both Arohi and Vihaan cross paths

title: Love You Papa
description: Love You Papa is an emotional rebirth drama about betrayal, second chances, and unbreakable bonds. Billionaire heir Rudra Agnihotri dies after being deceived by his greedy mother, only to wake up 14 years in the past—back in his childhood. With memories of his tragic fate intact, Rudra vows to protect his father, rebuild their lives, and change destiny itself, no matter who stands in the way.

title: Love your Lies
description: When Naina Kothari returns home after two years, she finds her world shattered, her boyfriend Mukund is now engaged to her sister Kavya. In a bold act of revenge, Naina impulsively marries Rohan Seth, only to discover unexpected love, betrayal, and redemption as forgotten bonds resurface. Watch Now!

title: Love Trap
description: Love Trap

title: Unchained Love
description: Trapped in a one-sided love and a transactional relationship, Sara’s engagement is shattered when her fiancé’s old flame returns. But betrayal fuels her transformation—from a helpless lover to a self-made woman ready to reclaim her life.

title: Fir Se Hua Love Siyapa
description: When romantic couple Viraat and Ahaana try to build a life together, their parents—flamboyant spiritualist Mihir and high-society diva Anupama turn their love story into a full-blown family circus. From viral proposals to runaway brides, drunken marriages, and chaotic rishta sabotage, love turns into a hilarious battlefield where family drama threatens to steal the spotlight. Watch Now!

title: Shraapit Ishq
description: Ek shraapit devta ki nazar jismein jo dekhe uski kismat badal jaati hai, insaan aur bhagya ke beech ka khel hai. Jab mohabbat aur shraap takraate hain, to har rishta ek imtihaan ban jaata hai .

title: Kadhi Chawal Ka pyaar
description: A simple, white-shirted Chawal marries the elite Kadhi, but she betrays him for the wealthy, greasy Kachori. After a bitter legal battle and a brutal beating, Chawal vows to change his "status" and flees to Hyderabad. There, he undergoes a fiery transformation with Chicken and Mutton to become the billionaire king of dishes, Biryani. In the end, he coldly rejects a now-destitute Kadhi, leaving his "fika" past behind to rule the culinary world.

title: Big Fat Love
description: Love, Lies & Payback

title: Aloo Bhindi Ka Pyaar
description: In the dramatic "Sabzi Mandi," Aloo and Bhindi defy their traditional families and a jealous Gobi to protect their forbidden romance. Their journey leads them through a high-stakes vegetable courtroom and a stint in "Cold Storage" before proving their innocence. With the support of friends, they escape the label of being "rotten" to perform a sacred "Kadhai Marriage". Ultimately, their families unite, realizing their world-famous combo is powered by true love.

title: Momo Chutni ka pyaar
description: After being brutally humiliated and nearly fried by his street-food rivals, a humble Momo hiding his billionaire status as a "cheap dough ball" undergoes a royal transformation to reclaim his title as the world-renowned "Ming," destroy his enemies' reputations, and find true love with a premium Mayonnaise.

title: Secret Billionaire Delivery Lover
description: A billionaire tycoon disguises himself as a delivery boy to find Kavya, the girl who once gave him hope. Kavya, an aspiring singer trapped in a toxic household, struggles to hold on to her dreams while the world pushes her down. As emotions grow and lives intertwine, secrets, power, and love clash in ways that will test them both. A gripping tale of hidden identity, ambition, and passion that will keep you hooked till the very end.

title: Pehle Badla Phir Mohabbat
description: On our third wedding anniversary, my husband humiliated me and threw me away for his mistress. They thought I was powerless—but they didn’t know I’m the daughter of the richest man in the country. His entire fortune came from me. That same day, fate led me to a powerful billionaire who changed everything. Now, I have wealth, influence, and a new identity. Let the tables turn.

title: Mafia Se Mohabbat
description: Don Kabir’s world is turned upside down after a mysterious night with Sanya leads to an unexpected pregnancy. As secrets unravel and enemies close in, love, blood ties, and betrayal collide in this gripping saga.

title: Bachpan ka Pyaar
description: Aarav and Preeti were married as kids but got separated when her family moved away. 15 years later, they unknowingly meet again at work — neither recognizing the other. As they fall in love, both keep searching for the childhood partner they once married, unaware they’ve already found each other.

title: Pyaar To Hona Hi Tha
description: My Accidental Billionaire

title: Papa Meri Jaan
description: Jab ek simple vada pav bechne wala Ranvijay Deshmukh ki beti Ananya ko powerful Bajaj khandan kidnap karta hai, tab saamne aati hai uski asli pehchaan " Legendary fighter Captain Jwala". Apni beti ko bachane aur mafia ke empire ko khatam karne ke liye Ranvijay ek khatarnaak yudh chhedta hai jo shahar ke power balance ko hila deta hai. Watch Now!

title: Bhatiji Ki Dost, CEO Ki Deewangi
description: “A simple, innocent girl becomes the obsession of a powerful and emotionally damaged CEO after she saves him in an unexpected moment. Torn between her loyalty to her best friend and his uncontrollable passion, their lives collide in a storm of love, madness, and dangerous desire.”

title: Pyaar Ki Race
description: When runaway bride Vani crashes into the world of mysterious racer Shaurya, sparks fly amidst high-speed chases and deadly secrets. As past wounds resurface and dark truths unravel, their intense bond is tested by betrayal, danger, and love that defies all odds. "Racing for Love" is a fiery romance-thriller where every heartbeat echoes like a revving engine. Watch Now!

title: Pyaar Ke Liye
description: A devoted wife makes a dark bargain to restore her husband’s lost success, only to face betrayal, heartbreak, and a deadly price. But when fate gives her a second chance under a new identity, she must protect her daughter and reclaim her place.

title: Dark Web - Pyaar Ya Paap
description: डॉ. त्रिशा, एक 35 वर्षीय मनोवैज्ञानिक जो अपने अपमानजनक पति देवराज के साथ एक असफल विवाह में फंसी हुई है, और विवान नाम के एक रहस्यमय 21 वर्षीय युवक के साथ उलझ जाती है जो उससे मिलने के लिए एक दुर्घटना का नाटक करता है। जो एक वर्जित प्रेम कहानी के रूप में शुरू होता है, वह एक अंधेरे मोड़ ले लेता है जब त्रिशा को पता चलता है कि दोनों पुरुष "डार्क वेब बार" से जुड़े हुए हैं, जो एक अपराधिक संस्थान है जहाँ महिलाओं को नशे में धुत्त करके तस्करी की जाती है। शुरुआत में त्रिशा को लगता है कि विवान ही शिकारी है, लेकिन बाद में उसे पता चलता है कि वह वास्तव में "शक्ति फोर्स" का नेता है, एक न्यायप्रिय संगठन जो उसके अपने पति देवराज द्वारा चलाए जा रहे तस्करी के जाल का भांडाफोड़ करने के लिए काम कर रहा है। सीरीज़ का चरमोत्कर्ष एक नाटकीय बचाव अभियान में होता है जहाँ विवान और उसकी टीम त्रिशा को ऑनलाइन नीलामी से बचाती है, जिससे देवराज की गिरफ्तारी होती है और उसके पीड़ितों को न्याय मिलता है। यह शो रोमांस, क्राइम थ्रिलर और सामाजिक टिप्पणी के तत्वों को मिलाता है, वैवाहिक हिंसा, मानव तस्करी और धोखे पर आधारित रिश्तों की जटिल प्रकृति के विषयों की खोज करता है, जबकि अंततः यह संदेश देता है कि प्रेम बुराई पर विजय पाता है।

title: Ye Ishq nhi asaan
description: On the day of her wedding, Vamika’s world crumbles when she catches her fiancé with her best friend, but a chance encounter with the mysterious and charming Shaurya offers an escape — one wild night that deepens into something more. As Vamika finds solace and growing affection in his presence, she’s faced with an unexpected proposition: to stay, she must sign a contract built on submission and trust. Just as she begins to fall, a shocking revelation turns her world upside down — Shaurya isn’t just a stranger, but someone intricately tied to her past. A gripping tale of betrayal, desire, secrets, and forbidden love.

title: Pyar Dhoka or Promotion
description:
In the glamorous yet cutthroat world of corporate power, secrets are the ultimate currency. Simran and Purab, two high-profile executives, are bound by a marriage they keep hidden from the very empire they run thanks to strict company policies. But behind closed doors, their relationship is on the verge of collapse.

Enter Veer and Tanya, ambitious new interns who quickly realize that charm can be just as powerful as talent.

title: Pyaar, Paisa aur Raaz
description: When billionaire CEO Rudra Raychand’s one-night encounter with spirited lawyer Akanksha leads to a forgotten past, secret parentage, and ruthless betrayals from her sister Ekta, their worlds collide in a storm of power, love, and revenge. As hidden truths surface and family bonds are tested, Rudra and Akanksha must fight for love, legacy, and the daughter they never knew they shared. Watch Now!

title: Bepanah Ishq
description: When love turns into an unbreakable obsession, every choice becomes a matter of life and death. This is a thrilling tale of passion, betrayal, and the dangerous lengths one will go to for the one they can’t let go. A heart-pounding journey where romance and revenge walk hand in hand. Watch Now !

title: Ghar Aaja Mere Laal
description: A heart-wrenching tale of a mother's wait, a child's lost identity, and the power of love that defies decades. What happens when the truth confronts power, and blood ties test the strength of destiny? Discover an emotional rollercoaster that redefines family and belonging. Watch Now !

title: Mera Pehla Pehla Pyaar
description: Mera Pehla Pehla Pyaar

title: Mohini Ka Shraapit Pyar
description: She was never just a girl. He was never just a man. "Return Of The Forgotten Heart" is a supernatural saga where love, revenge, and ancient powers battle for control. What happens when the heart remembers what the mind has forgotten? Watch Now.

title: Pyaar Ka Dose
description: She came to treat wounds, but ended up healing her own. Treated with Love is an emotional rollercoaster of second chances, silent heartbreaks, and an unexpected connection that changes everything. Watch Now!

title: Ziddi Aashiq
description: "Ziddi Aashiq" follows Ashray, a poor street cricketer, and Anjali, a wealthy mute girl, whose romance is destroyed when her arrogant father and a cruel suitor, Balwant, force her into an abusive marriage. After a dark spiral into alcoholism, Ashray claws his way onto the Indian national cricket team. He ultimately confronts Balwant to rescue Anjali, wins a high-stakes international match, and reunites with her to build a new life.

title: Brother Loves me again
description: Description - Brother Loves me again

title: Game, Set, Pyaar
description: microdrama

title: Big Bull Hai Mera Aashiq
description: At her own engagement party, Ananya Joshi uncovers her fiancé Rohan Rathore’s betrayal with her cousin Rhea. Determined to reclaim her power and dignity, she forms an unlikely alliance with the ruthless tycoon Vikram Singh Rathore, Rohan’s formidable uncle. But as their revenge game turns into a whirlwind of power, passion, and family warfare, Ananya must choose between vengeance and love in a battle that could destroy them all. Watch Now!

title: Ziddi Ishq
description:
Trisha — ek ladki jiska dil kab ka kisi aur ke liye dhadak chuka hai, aur jiska artificial heart sirf uske sacrifice ki yaad hai. Saat saal baad woh wapas aayi hai — ek pendant, ek sach, aur ek hisaab ke liye. Rohit, jise usne zindagi di thi, aaj usi zindagi ko barbad kar raha hai.
Pyaar tha… badla ban gaya. Ab sawaal ye hai — kya Trisha is baar apna dil bacha payegi?

title: Tu Mera Saiyaara
description: Superstar singer Raj Mathur ka life tab badal jaata hai jab uski girlfriend Julie usse dhoka deti hai, aur heartbroken hoke woh red-light area mein Rani se milta hai - ek prostitute jisme singing ka hidden talent hai.  Contract marriage se shuru hoke real love tak ka ye journey hai, lekin jab Raj ki jealous billionaire music producer Shanaya ko pata chalta hai, toh woh Rani ko kidnap karke torture karti hai - kya Raj apni pregnant wife Rani ko bacha payega aur Shanaya se badla le payega?

title: Pyar Ka Toofan
description: micro drama

title: Mohabbat Manzil
description: माधुर, एक आत्मीय लेकिन आत्मविश्वासहीन संगीतकार है, और स्नेहा, एक होटेल ट्रेनी मैनेजर, जो अपने सपनों को साकार करने की कोशिश में है। होटल कोहिनूर की चमक-धमक, वर्गभेद, महत्वाकांक्षा और चालबाज़ियों के बीच उनका रिश्ता धीरे-धीरे परवान चढ़ता है। जहाँ माधुर अपने संगीत और प्रेम के लिए लड़ता है, वहीं स्नेहा समाज की अपेक्षाओं और अपनी आत्म-सम्मान की लड़ाई में उलझी होती है। तीव्र टकरावों, संगीत के संघर्षों, वर्गीय विभाजन और दिल छू लेने वाले बलिदानों के साथ, “सेंसेशन” साहस, प्रेम और आत्म-परिवर्तन की एक मार्मिक कहानी पेश करता है।

title: My Mother's Lover
description: A rising superstar is forced to officiate her own mother’s wedding only to discover the groom is the powerful man who once tried to control her career and her life. Trapped in a billionaire’s mansion as his new stepdaughter, Shreya must protect her mother from a charming predator who wants them both, and will destroy everything to keep them.

title: Guns & Gulab
description:
This story is a high-voltage romantic thriller set against the backdrop of crime, power, and emotional conflict. It explores the journey of Naina, an innocent yet resilient girl, whose life takes a drastic turn when she crosses paths with Kabir Ahuja—a ruthless mafia don who falls obsessively in love with her.
The narrative blends intense romance with action, betrayal, and family drama. At its core, it questions morality, power dynamics, and the meaning of love—whether love can be forced or must be earned.
With strong emotional stakes, dramatic twists, and a dominating male protagonist versus a morally grounded female lead, the story promises a gripping mix of passion, revenge, and transformation.

title: Fake husband, Nikla CEO
description: Isha, a kind and simple girl, is betrayed by her jealous step-sister Naina, who drugs her and tries to ruin her reputation. When her life falls apart, a simple security guard named Aadi stands by her side and marries her. What Isha doesn’t know is that Aadi is actually Aditya Shekhawat, a powerful billionaire hiding his identity. As secrets come out and enemies confess, love and truth give Isha the respect and happiness she deserves

title: Bade Miyaan Deewane
description: In a famine-stricken kingdom of Bhopal, on the brink of war in 1981, a starving old man Bundu Khan discovers a mysterious spirit that grants his deepest wishes. To escape being sent to die in battle, he impulsively marries three cousin sisters and promises them safety. But as Bundu grows younger and stronger with every act of love and compassion, enemies, betrayal, and war close in—testing whether this unlikely family can survive together. Watch Now!

title: Prince Paanwala
description:
This drama blends romance, revenge, hidden identity, and high-society power politics. At its heart is Ramya  Rajgeer, the secret heiress of a business empire and the anonymous genius designer “Miss Pearl.” After being humiliated by her opportunistic boyfriend, she impulsively marries Aasman Oberoi—unaware that he too is hiding his real identity as the billionaire head of the Oberoi Group.
Their contract marriage slowly transforms into real love, while enemies from both sides attempt to destroy them. The show explores ego clashes, family honor, ambition, betrayal, and redemption in the glamorous yet ruthless world of business dynasties.

title: The Ultimate Return
description: The Ultimate Return is a high-octane power drama where a man written off as a loser is revealed as Leo—the unseen kingmaker controlling billion-dollar empires. As ruthless heirs, corrupt elites, and broken relationships collide, love, ambition, and revenge play out in a brutal succession battle where power bows only to truth and courage.

title: Hukum Ka Ikka
description: "Hukum Ka Ikka" follows Kabir Malhotra, a disgraced mathematical prodigy hiding as a janitor who utilizes his superhuman calculation skills to rescue his love, Ananya, from a ruthless criminal underworld. To pay a massive ransom, Kabir infiltrates the high-stakes stock market, turning a single rupee into a billion-crore fortune through ghost trading and complex algorithms. After striking a desperate deal with a cold corporate CEO, he systematically dismantles his enemies’ financial empires

title: My Husband Is The Boss
description: A broken engagement, a public dowry humiliation, and a marriage decided within hours, Neha never imagined her life would change so drastically. Forced into a sudden wedding with Rohan, who claims to be poor, she enters a relationship built on misunderstandings and ego. But as secrets unfold, she discovers he is actually the city’s most powerful billionaire. Will this marriage turn into true love?

title: Aakhri Alvida
description: Raghav Malhotra has just months to live, but he doesn’t want pity—he wants to rewrite his legacy. Enter Kiara Singh, a headstrong woman with her own battles. What begins as a contract marriage turns into a journey of healing, unexpected love, and one final shot at happiness. Last Goodbye is a deeply emotional tale of letting go, holding on, and the kind of love that outlives time. Watch Now !

title: The Hidden Boss
description: A billionaire CEO, Manav, secretly fakes his own downfall to trap his rival, Karan. On his wedding day, he’s publicly humiliated as “bankrupt,” and his new wife Ritika’s family turns against him. Despite insults and betrayal, Manav silently endures, hiding the truth as he tests love, loyalty, and prepares a powerful comeback.

title: My Top Secret Desire
description: A struggling trainee at RAW Academy is assigned a tough mentor — his sister’s fierce and hot best friend who is older than him — and as they clash and grow closer, they uncover secrets and fall in love with each other.

title: The Devil Took Me Home
description: What if your safe place is where the devil waits? Pulled into a world of strange voices, chilling visions, and a love that feels cursed, she must uncover the truth before it consumes her. Step inside Devil Took Me Home, where evil wears a familiar face. Watch Now!

title: My Husband My Boss
description: Meher Verma enters a secret contract marriage to escape her toxic family—only to unknowingly cross paths with her mysterious husband two years later, as her new boss. In a world of ambition, hidden identities, and simmering tension, Meher must protect her heart and her secrets. But as sparks fly and buried truths threaten to surface, she’s forced to choose between love, loyalty, and freedom.

title: Sweet Revenge
description: Sweet Revenge is a dramatic tale of love, betrayal, and justice. Rachit, a devoted husband and real author behind his wife Prerna’s success, sacrifices everything for her—only to be cheated, framed, and abandoned. As truth unfolds, Rachit rises to reclaim his identity, expose deceit, and find true love, while Prerna faces the consequences of her greed. Watch now.

title: Crystal's Greatest Creation
description:
This story is a compelling exploration of hidden identities, love, and self-worth set against the backdrop of wealth and ambition. It challenges the idea of whether love can survive without truth and equality. The narrative follows two individuals who reject their powerful identities, only to rediscover themselves through each other.
Blending romance, drama, and high-stakes business conflict, the show presents a layered world of deception, family politics, and emotional transformation. At its core, it is a story of a woman’s journey from being an unseen force behind success to owning her power unapologetically.
With themes of betrayal, reinvention, and partnership, the show balances mass appeal with a modern, aspirational tone.

title: Super Dad Sunil Tyagi
description: A scrap dealer secretly living as a billionaire tests his daughter’s strength and love. When her rich fiancé betrays and humiliates them, the truth is revealed—bringing justice, redemption, and proving that real wealth is character, not money.

title: Miracle Of God
description: Rudra lives with the wealthy Sahgal family, but despite his loyalty and love for them, he is always treated like an outsider. One night, he is falsely accused of stealing a priceless 50-crore necklace. His father Vineet Sahgal and sister believe the accusation without question and throw him out of the house. Behind the scenes, his manipulative stepbrother Vikrant “Vicky” Sahgal is actually responsible for the theft and secretly enjoys watching Rudra’s humiliation.

title: Doctor Ka Badla
description: From ICU trauma to operating theatre triumphs, Dr. Shreya’s journey is a gripping tale of love lost, trust shattered, and a woman’s fierce comeback. As ghosts of her past threaten everything, will she choose revenge or redemption? A drama where every heartbeat counts. Watch Now.

title: Final Dhoka
description: After losing her parents, Divya finds family, love, and belonging in Shalini’s home and her son Ishaan. But Ishaan’s growing trust in the manipulative Rohini turns Divya’s life into a nightmare of false accusations, humiliation, and abuse. Betrayed by the man she loves and forced to walk away with her dignity shattered, Divya rebuilds her life elsewhere. When the truth finally emerges, Ishaan is left with guilt, regret, and the irreversible cost of his blind faith.

title: Waking Up Together
description:
जब तेज़-तर्रार अवनी अपने बीमार माँ के इलाज के लिए एक बेहोश करोड़पति एहसान से पैसों के बदले शादी करती है, तो वह एक रहस्यमय भेड़िया परिवार की साज़िशों में फँस जाती है। झूठे रिश्ते से शुरू हुई यह कहानी प्यार, विश्वासघात और अलौकिक शक्तियों के बीच बदल जाती है एक सच्चे साथ में।

क्या अवनी और एहसान अपने प्यार को बचा पाएंगे, या ताकत और विरासत की लड़ाई उन्हें अलग कर देगी?

title: Queen Of Snakes
description: Devika thought she had found love, only to discover her husband, Vikrant, was a prince who conspired to destroy her unborn child. Brutalized by his lawful wife and carrying the bloodline of an enemy who wiped out her village, Devika was forced to embrace her identity as a powerful Naag Kanya. As ancient curses flared, she watched her betrayers rot from within, proving that no one escapes the bite of karma.

title: Revenge in Second Life
description: In a decaying mental asylum, Tushita dies in front of her little daughter Abhira, leaving behind a box of letters revealing a heartbreaking story of betrayal, lost love, and stolen identity. When Varun, her estranged husband, finally learns the truth, he finds his real daughter replaced by the scheming women sambhavna. Tushita revelas sumbhavna dark intensions by coming as twin sister of Tushita.

title: Dil Ka Encounter
description: Dil Ka Encounter follows Ishaan Raghuvanshi, a haunted ex-sniper, and Sara Khanna, a billionaire’s daughter turned cadet after a life-changing rescue. Under a hidden identity, Sara joins a Special Forces academy—only to meet Ishaan, now broken and in hiding. As deception, rivalry, and power games unfold, a dangerous bond forms between them. This isn’t just action—it’s a battle between love and duty, past and redemption. Will Ishaan rise again… or lose everything once more? Watch now!

title: My Killer Bride
description: Armaan marries Kavya, the woman accused of killing his brother, to expose her as a serial husband killer. But as their dangerous game unfolds, he discovers Kavya is being forced into these crimes by her abusive stepfamily, who hold her mother hostage. Torn between revenge and love, Armaan must protect the very woman he set out to destroy, before their enemies strike again.

title: Swag se Swaagat
description: A powerful businessman, Thakur Saahb, secretly lives as a prisoner to complete a mission while hiding his identity—even from his own son. When his son Aman is brutally attacked by powerful enemies, Thakur returns to save him, revealing his true strength. Amid betrayal, revenge, and love, he destroys his rivals, restores justice, and protects his family while keeping his legacy intact.

title: Husband's Regret
description: Natasha makes a dark deal with a witch, sacrificing her own life so her husband Chirag’s broken fate can change. As Chirag becomes powerful and wealthy, he turns cold, divorces Natasha, and chooses his past love, never knowing the price she paid. Between betrayal, supernatural fate, and a mother’s silent sacrifice, this emotional tale asks: will his remorse come only after her death?

title: Daulat ki Taaqat
description: A misunderstanding turns violent when a man is mistaken for a stalker, only to reveal he’s a grieving father searching for his long-lost daughter, Naina. Years later, now a powerful yet secretive tycoon, he continues his search while battling betrayal, crime, and deception. As destinies collide, a lost daughter rises unknowingly close to him, facing love, betrayal, and identity. Watch now.

title: Yes Boss, No Boss
description: Ambitious CEO Elina Sen strikes a dangerous deal—to tame reckless heir Ranveer Khanna in exchange for power. But beneath boardroom battles and fiery attraction lies her hidden agenda: revenge against his brother Vikram, the man who destroyed her past. As love, manipulation, and betrayal collide, Elina risks losing everything—including her heart to the love-child with a heart of gold Ranveer. Watch Now

title: My Lucky Star
description: This is a romantic drama set against the backdrop of power, identity, and social justice. The story follows Akira, a brave village girl who enters a forced marriage with Lakshya, a billionaire who hides his identity as a poor caterer. While Akira joins the Vardhan Group to stop the demolition of her village’s livelihood, Lakshya secretly helps her while maintaining his disguise. Their relationship evolves from awkward strangers to partners who fight injustice together. The show explores themes of class divide, hidden identity, ambition, love, and rural empowerment. With humour, romance, and emotional confrontations, the narrative builds towards Akira proving that compassion and roots are more powerful than wealth.

title: Return Of The Superstar
description: After ten years behind bars for a murder he didn't commit, rising star Sameer emerged to find his world shattered. His childhood love, Sonia, had climbed the ranks to superstardom, leaving him in the shadows of his past. To reclaim his life, Sameer struck a deal with the powerful CEO Asmita. Amidst dangerous conspiracies and industry sabotage, he fought to expose the truth. In a world of fake glamour, his journey became a brutal quest for justice.

title: Chuppa Rustom
description: A humble salesman, Tanay, secretly the heir to a massive business empire, hides his identity to find true love with Dia. Misjudged as poor, he faces insults from her greedy family while proving his worth through hard work. Dia betrays him for wealth, unaware of his real status. After rising as a powerful entrepreneur, Tanay exposes the truth, leading to regret, revenge, and justice.

title: Not a Delivery Guy
description: A delivery boy, Rohit, secretly a billionaire founder, hides his identity to keep his wife Manisha happy. However, her ambition and greed lead her to abort their child and grow close to her wealthy ex, Shashank. Misunderstandings, betrayal, and class conflict escalate, pushing their marriage to the brink as Rohit struggles between love and revealing his true power.

title: Band Baja No Barat
description:
Isha , a billionaire heiress living a humble life as a flower decorator, dreams of a simple love with her boyfriend Amar. On the day he is supposed to propose, she is humiliated publicly when Aniket and his mother deny knowing her.
But the humiliation takes a shocking turn when India’s richest man, Sumer Bakshi, walks into the party and declares Isha  as his future wife.
As secrets unravel, betrayal, pride, and power collide in a dramatic confrontation that changes everyone's fate.

title: Secret Fiancée Of The CM
description: Sara, a determined intern, gets caught in a dangerous political scandal involving rising leader Vyom Saxena after a mysterious night changes everything. As enemies plot to ruin him, Sara risks her career and identity to protect him—while hiding a truth that could destroy them both. In a world of power, lies, and love, one wrong move could change everythin

title: The Double Life Of Prime Minister
description: Naina, a struggling waitress burdened by debt and a dying mother, is forced into a dangerous situation that leads her to Krish. Unaware that he is the Prime Minister himself, Naina believes Krish is only the PM’s look-alike living a secret life. A marriage of necessity pulls her into power, lies, and national conspiracies, where the truth could cost lives and love becomes the biggest risk.

title: Adha Pyar
description: Chandni enters Somesh’s life pretending love but secretly plots with Rajiv to seize his empire. Through manipulation, murder, and betrayal, she destroys his family and leaves him broken. Surviving against all odds, Somesh uncovers their crimes, outsmarts them, and turns the game around. As greed and deceit consume Chandni and Rajiv, Somesh rises from “andha pyaar” to calculated revenge, ultimately reclaiming justice, family, and love.

title: Mere Papa The Great
description: A stubborn billionaire grandfather Nishant Arora becomes convinced a lost child Piku is his heir, forcing his reluctant son Sidhaant to search for a past he barely remembers. Meanwhile, a struggling single mother Rituparna fights the world to save her son—unaware he belongs to that very family. As truths collide, love, ego, and destiny entangle in a battle over identity, acceptance, and what it truly means to be a parent. Watch Now.

title: The Secret Son of a Trillionaire
description: A poor vegetable seller, rejected and humiliated by everyone, discovers he is the true heir to a trillionaire empire. Choosing to hide his identity, he joins his own company as an intern. While his ex-girlfriend and a fake heir insult him, he quietly plans his comeback. Amid love, power, betrayal, and revenge. How long before the truth explodes and changes everything?

title: The Billionaire Behind Bars
description: The Billionaire Behind Bars – Billionaire Qaidi is a modern romantic drama that explores love beyond wealth, status, and appearances. The story follows Raghu, a billionaire industrialist who sacrifices his freedom for love and chooses anonymity to escape gold-diggers. Betrayed by the woman he trusted, Raghu finds unexpected warmth in Suhana, a powerful businesswoman, and her daughter Ridhi. Their emotional journey contrasts fake ambition-driven relationships with genuine human bonds. The narrative blends romance, betrayal, class conflict, emotional redemption, and dramatic revelations. With sharp dialogues, high emotional stakes, and strong female characters, the show highlights how true love recognises character, not currency.

title: Rocketwala Billionaire
description: Ashok learns Kiara has last-stage lung cancer and must be treated within 3 days. A nurse mistakenly tells Kiara that Ashok is the cancer patient, making her panic—not for love, but for money. She insults him, refuses to help, and breaks up. After a time jump, Simmi wins a prestigious science award linked to ISRO, but Raman Raizada and his son Sam sabotage the ceremony, calling her a fraud and trying to snatch the trophy. Ashok fights back, revealing his influence.

title: The Broken Billionaire
description: The Broken Billionaire " is a high-stakes microdrama that follows the emotional and professional transformation of Gyan, an AI prodigy who sacrifices a lucrative career to serve as a secretary for Neeta, his long-time unrequited love. For four years, Gyan manages Neeta’s life and company, "Near Solutions," while secretly living in her mansion under a pact: if her true love never returns, she might accept him

title: Breakup Se Bana Billionaire
description: After being dumped at the marriage registrar for a richer man, struggling techie Aditya impulsively marries a stranger, Preeti, unaware she is a billionaire CEO. What begins as a deal-driven marriage turns explosive when Aditya is revealed to be the long-lost heir of a powerful business family, and the very man who humiliated him becomes his rival. As love, identity, and ambition collide, Aditya must choose between revenge, legacy, and the woman who believed in him first.

title: Bhikhari Fighter
description: A fearless martial arts master lives as a beggar, hiding his legendary past. When love and honor drag him back into the fighting world, enemies rise and secrets explode. Betrayal, destiny, and raw power collide as he reclaims his true identity as the Grandmaster. Watch now.

title: Brahmrakshas
description: When a wedding in the silent village of Dhumgarh breaks an ancient taboo against noise, a curse awakens—the vengeful spirit of Dev, a once-noble scholar betrayed in love and transformed into the dreaded Brahmrakshas. As brides mysteriously vanish, Ira, a fearless paranormal expert, arrives to uncover the truth.

title: Toofani Bodyguard
description: A mysterious Kalaripayattu warrior, Krishna with a forgotten past becomes the shield of a brilliant pharma CEO, Rutvi who discovers a cancer cure - only to discover that their destinies, love, and a decades-old vendetta were bound long before fate reunited them. Watch now!

title: CEO Bana Ghar Jamai
description: Thrown out by his wife and family, Abhimanyu is mocked as a useless man—unaware to them he is actually a powerful hidden CEO.Betrayed and humiliated, Abhimanyu begins his rise back to the top as secrets, mistaken identities, and family conflicts unravel.Now revealed, he must decide whether to reclaim his love or walk away forever after exposing the truth.

title: Nalayak Billionaire Pati
description: A seemingly useless house-husband is humiliated, betrayed, and thrown out by his ambitious wife—only to reveal he’s the secret billionaire CEO she depended on all along. As love turns to vengeance, a high-stakes game of power, lies, and karma unfolds, exposing greed, infidelity, and the true cost of underestimating the man who sacrificed everything.

title: Hidden Crorepati
description: A gripping tale of love, betrayal, and hidden identities,Hidden Crorepati follows Tanya, a secret tycoon posing as a receptionist, and Rajvir, a conflicted CEO. A fake marriage turns real amid power struggles and heartbreak. After tragedy and a shocking truth, Rajvir lives as a janitor—until his past returns, forcing him to confront love, loss, and destiny.

title: Commando Panther
description: A decorated special forces commander, living incognito as a mechanic to escape his traumatic past, finds his secret life upended when he falls for a powerful CEO, forcing him to confront old enemies, a web of corporate conspiracies, and his own guilt to protect his new love and reclaim his destiny. Watch now.

title: Dangerous Divorce
description: "Wrong Diagnosis, Right Divorce" is a devoted husband is ready to die for love—only to discover love was the lie. Betrayal, greed, and ambition strip him of marriage, dignity, and everything he built. But when truth, talent, and karma collide, justice arrives sharper than revenge. Watch now.

title: Secret Shaadi
description: Varsh Marwa, heir to a powerful business empire, refuses to become CEO and goes undercover as a peon in his family’s failing Bastar coal company. There, he joins Bhavya, a poor but honest girl, to expose deep-rooted corruption and a coal mafia. Forced into a secret contract marriage to save Bhavya, Varsh hides his identity until it’s revealed at an international summit—uncovering betrayal within his own family and turning his mission into a fight for love, truth, and redemption.

title: Jadui Healer
description: a young man named Ajay discovers he possesses mystical powers to both heal and kill with his hands, a secret he carries for fifteen years while building a business empire as the mysterious "Agyaat." After using his abilities to save the daughter of a billionaire and restore the beauty of his long-lost love, Nalini, Ajay faces off against the corrupt Mittal family who once tried to destroy him

title: Billion Dollar Wala Revenge
description: When a powerful tycoon freezes his sons’ fortunes, calm and principled Prithvi chooses dignity and hard work while his jealous brother Harsh chooses revenge. A contract marriage with fiery CEO Ragini pulls Prithvi into a web of corporate sabotage, betrayal, and a deadly conspiracy. As poison, greed, and attempted murder shatter the Diwaan empire, Prithvi must rise from ruin to expose the truth. But in the battle for legacy and love, who will truly win his heart? Watch now.

title: Gaadi Wala Panga
description: A billionaire CEO disguises himself as a beggar to find true love—only to marry a woman who betrays him for money, power, and passion. When her secret affair crashes headfirst into his world, love turns into war. What follows is a brutal game of deception, revenge, and redemption, where loyalty bleeds, masks fall, and a broken man must choose between destroying his past or saving the one soul who truly stood by him.

title: Badri ki Badsoorat Dulhaniya
description: This story follows a billionaire who believes true love is felt, not seen. After a chance meeting, he searches for a mysterious girl, unaware she is a rejected daughter with a hidden beauty and painful past. As families lie and identities clash, love challenges society’s idea of beauty and proves that real connection goes deeper than the face.

title: Empire of Betrayal
description: When sweet, faceless housewife Alisha—secretly the Raichand empire’s “princess”—is framed in a scandal and thrown out by her greedy husband Vicky, she stops begging and starts hunting. With the help of his disgraced step-uncle Rishi and her ruthless brother Harsh, Alisha storms high society to expose the Oberois, bankrupt their lies, and turn her divorce into a public coronation… and a dangerous new love.

title: Ajnabi Rishta
description:
