Baby Loading Pyaar Pending is an engaging story of a pregnant college student, who fights stigma, poverty, and heartbreak while hiding a marriage born of sacrifice.
A powerful CEO unknowingly crosses paths with the wife he once rejected. Fate forces truth, redemption, and love to reunite a broken family. Watch now.

title: My Accidental Husband
description: My Accidental Husband is a powerful drama where fate collides two broken lives through a shocking IVF mistake. Payal, abandoned and abused for being childless, finally conceives—only to be discarded by her husband. The child she carries belongs to Ranvijay Rathore, a feared yet principled man bound by legacy and power. As love slowly grows, they face betrayal, violence, and family conspiracies, turning motherhood into a battlefield and love into an act of courage.

title: Dahaad
description: Dahaad is a story of a rising wrestler, whose dream shatters when betrayal, false doping charges, and sacrifice tear lovers apart. Eight years later, truth resurfaces through their daughter, forcing fate to reunite them. Dahaad is a powerful saga of love, sacrifice, redemption, and justice.Watch now.

title: Ek Mehenga Divorce
description: A brilliant young doctor’s perfect life hides a haunting past — a broken childhood, a father destroyed by a ruthless marriage, and a mother whose greed turns love into tragedy. Ek Mehenga Divorce is an emotional rollercoaster tracing how one costly divorce shatters generations, leaving behind scars deeper than any wound.

title: Billionaire Baap Ka Badla
description: "Billionaire Baap Ka Badla" is a story of a poor young man unknowingly works inside the empire that once abandoned him. Betrayed by love and robbed of his invention, he is publicly humiliated. At the moment of his lowest fall, fate reveals he is the lost heir to a powerful dynasty. Watch Now.

title: Dhurandhar Of Kashmir
description: Feared underworld kingpin Nic’s life takes a sharp turn when he meets Kusha, a sheltered girl fleeing her controlling mother. As danger, betrayal, and a police manhunt close in, their unexpected love becomes his path to redemption. But when Nic’s past resurfaces and a traitor destroys his empire, he must choose between vengeance, family, and the woman who awakens his humanity.

title: My Dream Girl
description:
Khushi, a young working woman, gets drunk for the first time and accidentally enters billionaire Vikram Singhania's car thinking it's her Uber. This drunken encounter leads to an unexpected kiss, setting off a chain of events that keeps bringing them together. When Khushi discovers Vikram at what she thinks is a doctor's clinic (he was just pretending while waiting for his mother, the actual doctor), their awkward connection deepens.
As fate continues to intervene, Vikram becomes increasingly drawn to Khushi and repeatedly saves her from dangerous situations - from predatory colleagues to workplace harassment.
Despite his wealth and status, Vikram finds himself genuinely falling for the independent and spirited Khushi. However, Khushi resists his advances, citing her need for commitment and proper family involvement before any serious relationship.
Through a series of misunderstandings about a supposed boyfriend, workplace drama involving her manipulative colleague Kamini and lecherous manager, and Vikram's persistent romantic gestures, their relationship evolves from awkward encounters to genuine affection. Vikram helps Khushi get justice against her harassing manager, but their relationship reaches a turning point when he confesses his genuine feelings and questions whether she feels the same. After giving her space by going on a foreign trip, Vikram returns to find Khushi with another man, reigniting his jealousy and doubts about her mysterious boyfriend. As Khushi struggles with her growing feelings while maintaining her principles of independence, and Vikram learns that winning her heart requires patience and understanding, the season ends on a cliffhanger - leaving their romantic fate hanging in the balance.

title: Hamare Aakhiri 7 Din
description: Days before his wedding, Akshat chooses a radical memory erasure procedure to forget Soumya after she abandons him for her supposedly terminally ill ex, Harsh, only for the truth to emerge too late, leaving Soumya desperate to reclaim a love Akshat no longer remembers.

title: Super Dad
description: Kabir is an ordinary man abandoned by his wife for a wealthy man and his family, leaving Kabir to raise their infant daughter Jiya alone. A mysterious Super Dad Reward System activates, testing Kabir’s love and sacrifice for ten years. When Jiya’s own mother returns, ready to trade her daughter’s life for power and status, Kabir is forced to stand against the most painful enemy of all.

title: My Crazy Ex-Girlfriend
description: Hardik Goyal’s perfect life collapses when he loses his company, reputation, and fiancée overnight. Betrayed and broken, fate pulls him into the shadowy world of the mafia, where power replaces principles. As danger escalates, Hardik reconnects with Niharika, his childhood savior, discovering love, strength, and destiny. Choosing the mafia becomes his only way to protect love, family, and his future.

title: Gun, Gangster Aur Good Boy
description:
Mafia Girl is a high-voltage romantic crime drama with dark humor and emotional depth.
Mayra, who rules the underworld with fear, experiences love for the first time—with a man who has nothing but honesty.
Sunny, always exploited and underestimated, finally becomes someone worth fighting for.
The show explores class divide, toxic love, power politics, and emotional manipulation.
Every episode blends romance, danger, and drama with shocking twists.
At its heart, it asks—can love survive when it is born in violence?

title: My Beautiful Warrior
description: A captivating romantic action drama where a fearless female fighter crosses paths with a man hiding a dangerous secret. Between battles, betrayal, and burning passion, they discover that love can be the strongest weapon of all.

title: Awaaz ka Billionaire
description: When a superstar’s fame is built on a stolen voice, a betrayed background singer survives murder and is forced to live under a false identity—only to return as a dangerous man determined to reclaim his voice, his love, and his true self.

title: My Extreme CEO Wife/The Female CEO
description: A fiery romantic drama about a bold, ruthless female CEO who rules the business world with power and precision—until she meets a man who refuses to bow to her authority. What begins as a clash of egos soon turns into a battle of hearts, where love proves even stronger than ambition.

title: Jabariya Shaadi
description: A fearless girl is kidnapped for a forced marriage to a spoiled zamindar’s son, but she turns the tables and fights back with unexpected courage. As family feuds, secrets, and chaos explode around them, this ‘jabariya shaadi’ becomes a wild clash of love, power, and destiny.

title: Silent Screams
description: An emotional thriller about Vaibhav and his autistic daughter Kirti. Trapped in a mall’s cold storage, Kirti can’t clearly express her fear, and no one takes her seriously. As she freezes, Vaibhav senses danger but is dismissed as unstable. The story exposes how society ignores broken fathers and silent, disabled children—asking how a child can die unseen in a crowded world.

title: Listen To God's Will
description: At her lowest point, a broken woman begins to receive subtle signs that guide her toward faith, healing, and purpose. As she learns to trust God’s will over her own desires, her life transforms through love, sacrifice, and divine timing.

title: Just Divorced
description:
A poor but self-respecting girl discovers that her absentee father is a powerful billionaire who refuses to acknowledge her.
Public humiliation, betrayal, and emotional abandonment shatter her childhood belief in love and family.
As a mother-daughter duo walks away from injustice, fate begins to test the father with guilt, loss, and truth.
This is the story of broken promises, hidden identities, and a daughter who refuses to beg for her father’s love.

title: Dangal ka Daamad
description: When an orphaned wrestling prodigy is betrayed by his guru’s jealous son and cursed to lose his strength at the worst moment, Kesari is left for dead—only to return as a broken, forgotten man. As love, legacy, and an ancient akhada hang in the balance, Kesari must reclaim his identity to defeat betrayal, destiny, and the past itself.

title: The Final Betrayal
description: 💃💃💃 During Navratri in Ahmedabad, street vendor Sejal is betrayed by boyfriend Prateek who leaves her for cousin Nandini. Mysterious beggar Shivam proposes a fake marriage to fulfill her dying grandmother’s wish. As they grow closer, Sejal discovers Shivam is actually Shah Industries’ billionaire CEO who went undercover. Despite initial hurt over his deception, true love ultimately prevails and they marry.

title: Game Of Swapping
description: When Varun pretends to lose his memory after a near-fatal accident, his longtime girlfriend Kiara coldly hands him off to her step-sister, claiming she was never his lover. As Varun uncovers a web of betrayal, financial crime, and a fabricated pregnancy, he finds himself torn between a woman who used him for power and another woman (Kiara's friend) who loved him silently for years, turning a cruel amnesia prank into a devastating game of love, lies, and emotional replacement.

title: Kohinoor King Returns
description: Dev Singhania lives as an ordinary man, hiding the truth that he is the legendary Kohinoor King and a doctor. When his wife Aisha and daughter Kiara are pushed into danger by cruel families and dark conspiracies, Dev is forced to awaken his true identity. Love, sacrifice, and revenge drive him to reclaim his throne, crush his enemies, and rewrite destiny as the Kohinoor King: an unstoppable force feared across the world.

title: Great Desi Wedding (Haryanvi)
description: In The Great Desi Wedding, a celebration meant to unite two hearts turns into a storm of betrayal, vengeance, and buried secrets. When Radha’s honor is shattered by Meera’s jealousy and Arjun’s divided loyalties, love and tradition collide in a brutal test of truth. Amid rituals, revenge, and redemption, this “wedding” becomes a battle for dignity and justice.

title: You Are The Only One In The World
description: Ella Johnson, the only daughter of the Johnson family, was separated from her family as a child and adopted by her foster father. After overcoming numerous difficulties, she finally grew into a strong and independent woman with an indomitable spirit. At the age of 22, Ella Johnson fell in love with Ben at first sight, loving him unconditionally. However, due to her inner...

title: Aa Nimisham
description:
A young man’s life changes forever after a tragic accident draws him into a mysterious household. As secrets, lies, and hidden motives unfold, he must confront love, betrayal, and his own haunted past.
Aa Nimisham is an emotional thriller where every moment holds a revelation — and nothing is as it seems.

title: Mom I Am Back
description: An emotional family drama about a child who returns home after years of separation, carrying pain, guilt, and unspoken love. As old wounds reopen, a mother’s unconditional love becomes the bridge that heals what time and distance could not.

title: Dhokha, Shaadi aur Hungama
description: “A kind-hearted girl on her way to her brother’s wedding gets trapped in a nightmarish flight with a cruel woman and her spoiled son, leading to chaos that unravels shocking secrets of power, betrayal, and mistaken identity. When love, lies, and family honor collide, a storm of revenge and revelation erupts midair and beyond.”

title: Jhaadoowala Billionaire
description: Neel Raichand, a wealthy heir rebelling against his mother’s arranged marriage plans, hides his identity as a cleaning staff. Snehal, an orphaned bride abandoned at the altar, impulsively proposes marriage to Neel. What begins as a marriage of convenience transforms into a journey of trust, loyalty, and love as they navigate class divides, hidden truths, and personal scars - proving that love can bloom in the most unexpected places. Watch Now!

title: Billionaire Boyfriend Ka Badla
description: Set against the glamorous yet cut-throat world of aviation and corporate empires, The Sky Between Us is a high-octane romantic thriller that begins with a chance meeting on a flight from Dubai to Mumbai and soars into a battle of egos, love, and legacy.

title: Billion Dollar Wali Galti
description: When airline tycoon Veer Chopra falls for the charming flight attendant Lara Smith, he thinks he has found his perfect match. But when his unsuspecting parents, Rajesh and Vinita Chopra, fly in to meet their future daughter-in-law, a shocking web of arrogance, deception, and humiliation unfolds mid-air turning love into the costliest mistake of Veer’s life.

title: Adhuri Aashiqui
description: A young couple’s marriage, once full of love, starts to fall apart under family pressure and personal conflicts, revealing that true commitment is about understanding, not just following rituals. Watch now.

title: Crorepati Chaprasi
description: An abandoned son returns years later with wealth, power, and a burning desire to reclaim his rightful place. But as secrets unravel and loyalties are tested, his journey of revenge collides with the search for love and belonging.

title: Queen Mom vs Gold Digger
description: A heart-warming yet high-stakes family drama where a devoted mother and her three sons battle betrayal from a toxic ex-husband and a manipulative fiancée. Through emotional trials, hidden truths, and dramatic confrontations, the family ultimately unites, love wins, and destiny brings the perfect soulmate into their lives.

title: Vilayati Babu
description:
Arjun, a wealthy businessman in disguise, returns to his village to uncover his father’s murderer and reunite with his estranged family.
Through dangerous encounters, corruption, and betrayal, he protects the villagers, exposes the culprits, and wins back his family’s trust, and finds love. Watch now.

title: Ultimate Waris
description:
Shivam lives like a shadow in his own home, mocked and humiliated by the very family he serves.
His sister Suparna’s cruel games twist every moment into shame and silence. Then, a secret note arrives, offering him a fragile spark of love. But in a house where masks hide daggers, even affection feels like betrayal. Aarti’s touch brings hope, yet also awakens fear. Because in Twisted Roots, love itself might be the deadliest trap. Watch Now!

description: fiction

title: Gaonwala Baap Crorepati
description: “When a city-bred girl discovers her long-lost father is a simple village farmer, her world of luxury and pride crashes into his world of values and honesty. Through laughter, tears, and love, both learn what family truly means beyond money and class.”

title: The Wedding Scammer
description:
This is the story of Chirag Saxena, a charming conman who turns love into a business. Living under multiple identities, he marries several women, each unaware of the others. His perfect lies begin to unravel when a determined officer, Yamini, starts to expose his web of deceit, leading to a tense game of love, betrayal, and survival.

Featuring some of the most loved youth actors, this romantic crime drama delivers gripping twists, high emotion, and irresistible chemistry in every episode.

title: Superstar's Bodyguard
description: When a fierce young wrestler enters a deadly underground fight to save her ailing mother, betrayal shatters her world and a mistaken encounter with a superstar ignites an unexpected bond. As she becomes his bodyguard and uncovers her stolen identity, love, danger, and deception collide—forcing her to choose between her past and the war for her future.

title: Miracle Ya Murder
description: A brilliant but arrogant doctor falls from grace after a scandal ruins his career, forcing him to work in a small village clinic. There, amid love, rivalry, and redemption, he discovers the true meaning of healing—of both body and soul.

title: LAMENT OF CHAOS
description: A DRAMATIC LOVE STORY. A NEW CHEMISTRY BETWEEN AN ARMY OFFICER AND A MUTE GIRL FINDING THEIR CHILDHOOD LOVE IN THEIR LIFE.

title: The Crypto King
description:
Vikram Mehra, a guilt-ridden businessman, dies after losing everything to his ruthless rival Raghav Malhotra and Rhea Kapoor. Granted a mystical chance to relive his past, Vikram awakens 6 years earlier, in 2019, determined to rewrite his fate and save his love, Ananya, from tragedy. 

Blending revenge, romance, and destiny, Vipreet Peedhi explores how one man’s repentance can alter not just his life, but time itself.

title: Dabang Daddy
description: Dabang Daddy follows the turbulent life of Ram Kumar, a principled architect betrayed by fate, as he clashes with his greedy stepson Jacky, manipulative wife Maya, and ambitious daughter-in-law Richa. When corporate tycoon Miss Tanya Malhotra offers Ram a second chance at success, greed, betrayal, and hidden truths threaten to tear apart his family. A gripping tale of love, deceit, and the true cost of money. Watch Now!

description: .Boss wants to marry me

title: Deewana
description:
What happens when the man who saves lives… becomes a killer to protect them? 
Ranveer Singh, a brilliant but hot-blooded surgeon, is torn between love, rage, and justice. From avenging his sister’s dignity to protecting a father who never gave him love, he battles enemies hidden within his own bloodline. Deewana is the story of a son’s obsession, a lover’s heartbreak, and a warrior’s vow to carve out justice, even if it costs him his life. Watch Now!

title: The Lost Daughter
description: Kusum, an 18-year-old working-class girl, endures relentless humiliation and exploitation from the wealthy Kapoor family, unaware she is their lost daughter, Sheena. Forced into desperate choices and framed for crimes she didn’t commit, she fights to survive. A DNA revelation exposes impostor Zoya and reunites Kusum with her true family, restoring the identity and love stolen from her. Watch now.

description: Revelation of marriage

description: A dramatic tale about a hospital mix-up that implants businessman Kabir’s sperm into a stranger, Jiya. As Jiya becomes pregnant, Kabir brings her home, sparking jealousy in his wife and chaos in the Khanna family. Amid betrayal, greed, and emotional turmoil, an unexpected love begins to grow between Kabir and Jiya. Watch now.

description: A poignant story of a son who grows distant from his mother after marriage, forgetting her sacrifices. When tragedy strikes, guilt and realization hit him too late. This story exposes the pain of neglecting parents in old age. It’s a moving reminder of love, duty, and the irreplaceable bond between mother and child. Watch now.

description: When loyalty clashes with love, a soldier of faith finds his heart on the other side of the gun. Usman, torn between his ruthless commander Sajjad and his forbidden love Fatima, must choose between duty, desire, and the truth that could change nations.

description: A young man sets out to lay his father’s ashes at the ancestral grave, but destiny pulls him into a storm of secrets and betrayal. Along the way, he meets a fierce girl whose father was branded a traitor. As truth unfolds, a ruthless martial artist rises to seize Qingi. Bound by love, honor, and legacy, the young warrior must face his greatest trial — to protect his people and accept his destiny as the next clan leader.

title: The Contract Wedding
description: A bold CEO proposes to a man she barely knows—unaware he’s the reclusive owner of a global empire. When scheming rivals, greedy relatives, and a spurned ex-girlfriend close in, power games erupt in the boardroom and beyond. In a twist-filled battle of status, secrets, and love, the fake husband may just become the real deal.

title: Great Desi Wedding
description: In The Great Desi Wedding, a celebration meant to unite two hearts turns into a storm of betrayal, vengeance, and buried secrets. When Radha’s honor is shattered by Meera’s jealousy and Arjun’s divided loyalties, love and tradition collide in a brutal test of truth. Amid rituals, revenge, and redemption, this “wedding” becomes a battle for dignity and justice.

title: Iceberg Dad Don't Run I'm Your Little Dragon Treas
description: A mysterious father hides a dark past beneath his calm surface, but his secrets begin to surface when danger threatens his family. “Iceberg Dad, Don’t Run, I’m Your Little Dragon Treasure” is a gripping tale of love, loyalty, and redemption.

title: The Runaway Groom
description: On his wedding day, a groom vanishes without a trace, leaving behind heartbreak and unanswered questions. As secrets unfold, love, betrayal, and destiny collide in a race to uncover the truth.

title: Shaadi Goals 101
description: “Shaadi Goals” is a vibrant family drama that blends romance, comedy, and chaos as two very different families prepare for a grand wedding. With lovebirds caught between tradition, clashes of culture, and hilarious misunderstandings, the story shows how true love and togetherness can survive even the most over-the-top shaadi madness

title: Sorry, Too Late
description: He had her love, but never valued it. Vaibhav and Sheena’s secret marriage turns into a story of betrayal, heartbreak, and regret. When Sheena finally walks away to choose self-respect, Vaibhav realizes the truth - but by then, it’s already too late.

title: Ishq Aaj Kal
description: Ishq Aaj Kal - follows five Mumbai dreamers whose lives intertwine through love, ambition, and heartbreak. Ishaan seeks acceptance, Isha chases fame, Naina faces a broken marriage, Shiraz struggles as a songwriter, and Armaan confronts his past. Each must choose between- love or money, dreams or society, the heart or the world.

title: Operation Chinar
description: Operation Chinar is a Kashmir set spy thriller about ATS officer Rudra Kaul, who returns home undercover during a college reunion to expose powerful politician Rafiq Mir’s terror network. As he digs deeper, Rudra is torn between a long-buried love, Meera, her fearless daughter Zara, and a conspiracy that reaches the highest ranks of the system,where every ally could be a traitor and every emotion a potential weapon.

title: HEROINE NOT OVERTHINK
description: Heroine Not Overthink is a lighthearted romantic drama about a spirited woman who decides to stop doubting herself and live boldly. Her carefree choices lead to unexpected love, laughter, and a journey of self-discovery.

title: Evil Phoenix Ridge
description: Evil Phoenix Ridge

title: Beautiful boss and Male bodyguard
description: “Beautiful Boss & Male Bodyguard” is a dramatic love story that blends passion, mystery, and tragedy. It follows Emma and Robert, two people bound by love yet torn apart by fate, betrayal, and deathly secrets. As emotions run high and reality blurs, the story reveals how love can survive even beyond life itself.

title: Beloved Darling: The CEO's Wife and Genius Baby
description: Beloved Darling: The CEO's Wife and Genius Baby tells the story of a young CEO's wife who must navigate the complexities of family, love, and business. With the help of her exceptionally gifted child, she faces challenges that could either tear them apart or bring them closer as a family.

title: Billionaire ka Sauda
description: Beauty & the Billionaire is a modern love-hate saga between Kishika, a shy medical student burdened by her family’s debts, and Vikrant Singh, a cold, arrogant billionaire with a dark past. When fate forces Kishika to work as Vikrant’s personal secretary to repay her late father’s loan, sparks ignite between the fiery opposites. What begins as a battle, but slowly turns into a desire, power, and redemption, where love might heal the beast or destroy the beauty forever. Watch now!

title: Delulu Dulha
description: When fiery small-town girl Naina accidentally crosses paths with arrogant business tycoon Arjun Mehta, a twist of fate forces them into a marriage neither wanted. Between clashing egos, hidden secrets, and unexpected sparks, their journey unfolds like a modern-day fairytale with a sharp twist, where love battles pride, and Cinderella isn’t waiting to be saved.

title: Baap Beta Aur Billion
description: A son discovers his simple father is secretly a powerful business tycoon controlling everything from the shadows. As truth unfolds, love, loyalty, and betrayal clash in a high-stakes family drama.

title: Rented a Rich Boyfriend
description: Rented a Rich Boyfriend is a dramatic romance filled with betrayal, secrets, and unexpected twists. Aditya, a simple middle-class man, is humiliated and abandoned by his fiancée Nandita when she chooses money and power over love. But fate ties him to Isha Raheja, a fierce billionaire heiress, sparking a fake marriage deal that slowly unravels shocking truths, hidden identities, and a love story no one saw coming.

title: Deal with Billionaire
description: “Deal with Billionaire” is a dramatic saga of love, betrayal, and destiny that follows Simran, a humble waitress who unknowingly belongs to a wealthy family. After years of struggle, heartbreak, and deceit, her life changes when she reunites with her four rich brothers and faces powerful enemies, toxic relationships, and a world of greed while fighting to reclaim her identity and self-respect

title: One Last Chance
description:
One Last Chance is a gripping tale of love, choices, and the price of regret. A woman walks away from true love, only to realize later what she lost - as the man she left behind rebuilds his life in a deeply loving and affluent relationship. Passion, heartbreak, and high-stakes emotions collide in this drama that will keep you hooked at every turn.

An emotional rollercoaster and one of the most interesting watches of the year.

title: Doctor Sahab & Cutie
description: Doctor Sahab Aur Cutie is a lighthearted romantic drama about fate, healing, and unexpected love. Dr. Arjun, a disciplined and aloof surgeon, crosses paths with bubbly and carefree Kavya, whose charm turns his orderly life upside down. As their worlds collide in hospitals, family drama, and heartfelt moments, their bond grows into a love story filled with laughter, warmth, and second chances.

title: Blind Billionaire
description: When fate brings together Namita, a struggling single mother haunted by her past, and Vihaan, a reserved businessman hiding his true identity, their accidental meeting blooms into an unexpected love story—one born from pain, trust, and second chances.

title: Kangaal Karodpati
description: A wealthy heir with ALS (Amyotrophic Lateral Sclerosis) meets a tribal healer who miraculously cures him using the mystical Rakta Kamal flower. Their bond turns into love amid family conflict, media scandals, and supernatural trials testing faith and loyalty. In the end, love triumphs, healing bridges two worlds and uniting their families forever. Watch now.

title: Shaadi On Fire
description: A fiery twin impersonates her shy sister to confront a ruthless billionaire, but ends up falling for his equally powerful twin. Between mistaken identities, passion, and power games, love turns into the most dangerous deal of all.

title: Revenge of my fake bride
description: Revenge of my fake bride follows Laila, a proud young woman betrayed on her wedding day and thrown out of her home. Rescued by Nakul, her fiancé’s rival with a hidden vendetta. She is drawn into a storm of love, power, and revenge. As loyalties shatter and enemies close in, will Laila remain a pawn in their game, or rise as the queen who rewrites it all? Watch now!

title: Fake Girlfriend
description: Fake Girlfriend is a powerful drama of love, betrayal, and hidden identities. Anika Malhotra, secretly the billionaire owner of Redrock, returns to India after ten years to reunite with her old love Ritwik, only to find him arrogant and greedy. When the truth of her identity shatters those who once humiliated her, Anika chooses self-respect, stands by true love, and redefines power on her own terms.

title: Masoom Ka Badla
description: Chhoti Si Ladki, Tycoon Mamaon Ki Rani is a dramatic romantic saga about innocence, power, and destiny. A poor, small-town girl unexpectedly enters the world of her ruthless billionaire uncles, who try to control her life and wealth. But as she learns to fight back with courage and heart, she transforms from a vulnerable girl into the queen of their empire—while finding love in the most unlikely place.

title: Bad**s Bodyguard
description: Bad**s Bodyguard follows Arya Dixit, a strong-willed billionaire CEO who rebels against her manipulative family’s plan to marry her off for money, only to find unexpected love and protection in her bodyguard, Neel. Their relationship sparks a storm of betrayal, power struggles, and hidden truths as love collides with greed and deception.

title: Billion Dollar Waali Shaadi
description: A poor but determined girl’s life turns upside down when a powerful CEO from her past forces her into a contract marriage, sparking a storm of secrets, betrayal, and forbidden love. As family rivalries and hidden truths unfold, she must fight for her dignity, her mother’s life, and her own heart.

title: Jab We Married
description: Road to Regret is a passionate romantic drama of betrayal, sacrifice, and unexpected love. Esha, a spoiled heiress, gets trapped in a toxic engagement with cunning Rohit, while her father’s failing health forces her into a sudden marriage with the loyal Aditya Suri. Bound by duty but torn between pride, manipulation, and growing emotions, Esha must decide whether love can truly rise from regret—or if it’s already too late.

title: Wild Secrets
description: When city girl Shefali steps into a dangerous jungle, she faces Garudaa - a fierce warrior who rules with power and passion. What starts with fear turns into fire, love, and revenge. Wild Secrets 🔥 is a bold saga of lust, loyalty, and survival - where ancient rituals clash with modern instincts in a world ruled by desire.

title: Restarting Life From Zero
description: Restarting Life From Zero" follows Nikhil, a shrewd businessman betrayed by his greedy wife Sushma and her family, as he loses everything but discovers hope again with Deepika, a selfless young woman who teaches him love and resilience. Amidst Sushma’s schemes, her foolish son Nihal, brother Mitesh, and manipulative mother Bharti, Nikhil fights to rebuild his world from scratch turning betrayal into strength, and revenge into a new beginning. Watch Now!

title: Deshbhakt Pandit
description: What happens when a nation’s future rests in the hands of one man who refuses to bow down? Deshbhakt Pandit takes you on a thrilling journey of resilience, sacrifice, and unshakable love for the country. Watch Now !

title: Dil Wala Divorce
description: Dil Wala Divorce follows Prapti, a woman betrayed by her own family and fiancé, who finds unexpected love and strength in Taksh, a mysterious businessman. What begins as revenge and heartbreak soon turns into a passionate, twisted romance.

title: Galti se mistake
description: mbitious and independent Ananya Sood finds her life turned upside down when a clinic mix-up leaves her unexpectedly pregnant. Facing judgment, secrets, and corporate politics under the sharp-eyed CEO Kabir Singh, she must choose between fear and courage. As hidden truths bind them together, Ananya learns that love, trust, and family aren’t accidents they’re choices made against all odds. Watch Now!

title: Chori Mein Mohabbat
description:
This is the story of a fearless, street-smart thief Aishwarya, whose life takes an unexpected turn when she crosses paths with Siddharth Raghuvanshi, the powerful heir of an underworld empire. What begins as a daring heist soon becomes a dangerous game of attraction, betrayal, and survival.
As Aishwarya’s sharp instincts clash with Siddharth’s authority, their chemistry turns electric — every glance charged with risk and desire. Between stolen money and stolen hearts, the line between love and crime starts to blur.
When a high-stakes robbery spirals out of control, both are forced to choose: trust their hearts or protect their secrets. In this world of deception and danger, one wrong move could cost them everything — even the love born from chaos.
At its core, Chori Mein Mohabbat is a passionate crime thriller — a story where romance ignites in the shadows of betrayal, and love itself becomes the ultimate heist.

title: Bloodline Betrayal
description: Bloodline Betrayal is a suspenseful romantic drama about love, trust, and shocking secrets. Rhea, who wakes up from a two-year coma, finds her world shattered—her husband married to her best friend and her identity almost erased. As she pieces her life back together, betrayal turns into vengeance, and love into a dangerous game where nothing is as it seems.

title: Toofaan
description: Toofan is a passionate romantic drama about desire, power, and unexpected love. Atharv Khurana, a billionaire CEO cursed with an inability to feel intimacy, is pushed by family pressure to find an heir or lose everything. But when a simple nurse, Aaradhya, awakens emotions in him that no one else could, their worlds collide—leading to obsession, betrayal, and a storm of love that could change both their destinies.

title: Worst Girlfriend
description: When influencer Diya turns her heartbreak into a viral “Worst Girlfriend Challenge,” things spiral from funny to real. What starts as content soon becomes chaos — and maybe, something deeper. Love, lies, and likes collide in this modern Mumbai romance. Watch Now!

title: Doctor's Divorce
description: Dr. Niraj Chandra and Dr. Sanya Chandra, once deeply in love, now stand at the crossroads of separation. As their children, Ayaan and Ahana, struggle to keep the family together, love, respect, and old wounds collide in an emotional journey of what it truly means to be a family.

title: Contract Wali Mohabbat
description: What happens when a marriage is just a contract, but the heart refuses to follow the rules? Payback Time is a gripping tale of desire, deception, and a woman’s determination to fight for her love. Watch Now !

title: Judwa Billionaire
description: Judwa Billionaire is an intense romantic drama of betrayal, sacrifice, and destiny. On her wedding day, Anjali discovers her groom’s shocking affair with her own sister Anaya, shattering her world. Forced into a marriage with the scarred and mysterious billionaire Jaydeep Raichand, she soon finds herself caught between his cruel tests, his charming twin Amandeep, and her own fight to save her mother—leading to a storm of love, lies, and survival.

title: Revenge Wali Shaadi

When her path crosses with Kabir Deewan, a man awakening from a coma with a mysterious past, their fates intertwine in a dangerous game of love, revenge, and shocking family secrets

title: Hansi Aur Virah
description: A story where love meets sacrifice, and laughter hides deep pain. Hansi Aur Virah takes you through Mohit and Akshita’s journey of broken trust, lost time, and tough choices. Will love survive when reality hits harder than dreams? Watch Now !

title: Rum Ne Bana di Jodi
description: Fiercely independent Priya and arrogant businessman Kabir Malhotra enter into a marriage of convenience bound by fate, not love. But as their hearts clash and hidden emotions rise, destiny plays its own game. In a world of contract vows, secret pasts, and family pressures, will their accidental marriage turn into a forever bond? Watch Now!

description: Life Swapping is a magical, emotional drama about rivalry, identity, and second chances. Gautam, a shy gamer constantly overshadowed by his arrogant brother Manit, stumbles upon a mysterious globe that grants his wish—to be like Manit. But when their souls are swapped for ten days, both brothers are forced to live each other’s lives, facing love, humiliation, and truth in ways they never imagined.

title: Ex's on Double Date
description: When Megha unexpectedly runs into her ex, Raghav, on a double date with Bhavna and Kabir, buried emotions, jealous sparks, and old wounds collide turning one night into a dangerous game of love, betrayal, and unfinished business. Watch Now!

title: The Perfect Revenge
description: A mother’s love, a husband’s betrayal, and a friend’s darkest secret! The Perfect Revenge is a storm of revenge, deceit, and shattered relationships that will keep you on the edge of your seat. Will truth win over lies, or will greed destroy it all? Watch now.

title: Forced To Marry Rich
description: A middle-class girl is forced into a marriage with a billionaire heir, torn between her lost love and a life of luxury bound by conditions. But behind the glittering walls of wealth lies betrayal, jealousy, and a dangerous secret that could shatter everything.

title: My Killer Wife Season - 2
description: The deadly game of love and lies continues, this time darker, deeper, and more dangerous. My Killer Wife Season 2 takes betrayal and obsession to the next level. Watch Now !

title: Like, Share and Destroy
description: When innocent village girl Meher is thrust into the opulent but treacherous world of Prince Ayaan, love blossoms amid royal politics, hidden agendas, and a fight for the truth. Watch Now!

title: Pocket Sized Mom
description: Pocket-Sized Mom is a heartwarming story that follows a tiny but mighty mother navigating everyday challenges with oversized love and humor. Despite her miniature size, she’s the biggest hero in her family’s life.

title: Once upon a time on Christmas
description: A heartwarming festive tale that weaves magic, laughter, and love across two worlds. When Santa’s clumsy elf John accidentally lands in India, his chaotic inventions bring unexpected joy to a struggling family—leading to a true Christmas miracle. Meanwhile, a spoiled city girl, Ananya, discovers the beauty of simplicity and kindness in a small village. From the snowy North Pole to rural India, this is a story where every pareshani turns mithi with a little Christmas magic.

title: Billionaire Lover Returns
description: A poor but spirited girl dies saving a billionaire and is mysteriously brought back to life a year before her death—with a choice between wealth or her memories. When fate reunites her with the same man, love, revenge, and celestial magic collide in a thrilling battle between destiny and desire.

title: Beghar Billionaire
description: Armaan Raheja, a billionaire disguised as a beggar, and Kashish, a kind-hearted girl with simple dreams, find themselves bound by fate, lies, and love. What starts as a contract marriage to fulfill a grandmother’s last wish soon turns into an emotional journey where truth, betrayal, and destiny test their hearts. Watch Now!

title: The Ultimate Boss
description: Vedant, a hidden billionaire, sacrifices his identity for love—only to be betrayed by the very woman he trusted most. Fate binds him to powerful businesswoman Tara in a contract marriage, where love, revenge, and secrets collide. In this storm of emotions, emerges… The Ultimate Boss.

description: Billionaire Scam Bride tells the thrilling story of Zara, a con artist who marries tech billionaire Aryan Malhotra under false pretenses - only to find herself falling for him. When lies start to unravel and Aryan discovers her secret, Zara must choose between running away with the fortune or staying to fight for the love she never meant to find.

title: Daddy aur Nanny
description: When a poor nanny enters the mansion of powerful CEO Rohit Rajvanshi, she has no idea that her past and present are about to collide. Little Atharav grows attached to her instantly, but with every passing day secrets, betrayals and hidden truths shake the Rajvanshi family. Can love lost be found again, and can a child become the bridge between two torn hearts?

title: Share Bazaar Ka Secret Billionaire
description: “Share Bazaar Ka Secret Billionaire” follows Daksh, a humble billionaire with a golden heart, whose wife Samaira, a ruthless tech entrepreneur, is manipulated by deceitful allies into believing he’s unfaithful. As betrayals, corporate conspiracies, and tragic misunderstandings unfold, Daksh’s true identity as Mr. Ocean, a secret magnate, is revealed. In a storm of revenge and redemption, love, greed, and ambition collide — ending with truth triumphing over deceit and Daksh reclaiming his honour.

title: The Boy Who Beat The Board
description: When chess grandmaster Mukesh Tandon dies tragically in a plane crash, his soul awakens in the body of a 13-year-old boy, Mukul. As he navigates a second life, Mukul reunites with his grieving wife Juhi, battles rival prodigies like Vikram and Zakir, and faces dark conspiracies from Kiara and King. With unmatched strategy and an unbreakable will, Mukul fights to reclaim his legacy and protect Juhi, proving that genius and love can transcend even death. Watch Now!

title: The Mistaken Child
description: When a child goes missing, secrets unravel and lives collide. The Mistaken Child is a gripping tale of love, betrayal, and the desperate search for truth. Every moment pulls you deeper into the mystery. Watch Now !

title: The Billionaire Intern
description: After 8 years in a coma, a hidden billionaire returns to win back his love and take revenge on those who thought he was just an intern. He came to live among the common man to find true love… but before he could tell Suhana the truth, a freak accident left him unconscious.

title: My Crush, My Kidnapper
description: My Crush, My Kidnapper is a dark romantic thriller about obsession, betrayal, and survival. Sneha, a passionate dancer, dreams of love and success, but her world shatters when a hidden video turns her into the target of blackmail and a dangerous crime syndicate. As her crush Amay tries to protect her, and Rahil’s twisted desire drags her deeper into a deadly trap, Sneha must fight not just for her dreams—but for her life.

description: Gold Digger by Mistake follows Maya, a hardworking girl wrongly labeled a gold digger after a twist of fate ties her to billionaire Arjun. As misunderstandings, class clashes, and hidden truths unfold, Maya must fight to prove her innocence — and figure out whether love can bloom between two people from completely different worlds.

title: Pati Patni aur Woh
description: A strong mother steps into the ruthless corporate world to protect her sons, who have grown into spoiled CEOs. Between power, betrayal, and family ties, she must teach them the true meaning of love and responsibility.

title: Major Madam
description: Dipika loved Major Rahul with all her heart, but he didn’t feel the same. She left everything behind and joined the army. Now she’s back - as Major Dipika - strong, proud, and no longer his. Watch this story of love, rejection, and a comeback like never before. Watch now!

title: Superstar Naukar
description: When a loyal orphan servant saves his wealthy employer’s life, he earns a place in the family—but not everyone accepts him. As secrets, betrayal, and forbidden love ignite, his devotion is twisted into scandal, putting his identity, love, and life at stake.

title: Secret Raat
description: In Billionaire Ki Legacy, Meri Kokh Se Shuru Hui, the fate of the powerful Mehta Empire rests on unexpected shoulders. Anaya, a simple yet determined woman, finds herself entangled in the lives of Samar Mehta, the heir to a vast fortune, Kabir, her past love with disruptive ambitions, and Sonia, the cunning rival who will stop at nothing for power. As secrets, betrayal, and love collide, Anaya’s womb becomes the beginning of a legacy that could redefine the empire’s future. Watch Now!

title: Adhure se Hum
description: When skilled doctor Meher signs a secret contract to care for businessman Aarav Bajaj’s ailing mother, she never expects it to bind her into a fake marriage—and a web of hidden truths. As loyalties are tested and hearts unexpectedly connect, Meher and Aarav must confront love, lies, and second chances that change their lives forever. Watch Now!

title: Bye Bye Husband
description: “When a loyal wife is betrayed and discarded by her arrogant husband, she rises from heartbreak to power—determined to teach him the value of love, respect, and regret. But revenge turns complicated when her strength makes him fall for her all over again.”

title: Mission Mohabbat
description: When duty meets desire, hearts are tested on the battlefield of honor. Rules, Ranks & Romance follows Major Vikram Sinha and Dr. Juhi Singh two souls bound by loss, loyalty, and forbidden love as they fight corruption, betrayal, and their own emotions within the rigid world of military discipline.

title: Billionaire Crush
description: Billionaire Love

title: Valentine Billionaire
description: A humble toy-store worker is pulled into the stormy world of a fallen cricket legend when an unexpected pregnancy ties their fates together—sparking love, danger, and a battle for family.

Watch Now!

Will she risk everything for love… or protect her dreams?

As their paths collide, both love and vengeance ignite, setting off a chain of gripping events that will test every bond.

description: She disappeared after that night, carrying a secret that could shatter his empire. Now, the billionaire wants answers and maybe her heart. Pregnant With Billionaire’s Child is a fiery tale of love, betrayal, and a baby that changes everything. Watch Now!

description: From heartbreak to high society drama, this is a gripping tale of a woman’s fight for her dignity, her children, and the love she never expected. Watch Now !

Fate cruelly reunites them when Jiya steals Samrat’s ring to fund Shreya’s life-saving surgery, leading to humiliation, conflict, and heartbreak before the truth finally surfaces: Jiya is Samrat’s daughter, and Shreya is alive. As love, guilt, and redemption collide amid social cruelty and class divides, Aakhri Diya becomes a story of lost love, a child’s hope, and a broken family finding its way back to light.
